Похоже здесь хотят добавить что-то интер:
It looks like they want to add something interesting in the 
updates to come!
Looks like we need to get to the other side.
Тут не пройти. Нужно вернуться назад и п:
There is no way through here. 
We need to go back and look for another way.
С нашим везением этот \"другой путь\" на:
With our luck, this "other way" must be guarded by some giant
swamp creature.
Наконец-то! Я уже начал думать, что он н: Finally! I was already starting to think that it would never end!
Вот! Этот островок напротив - мы там был: Here! This island before us - we were there, I remember.
Прекрасно! Значит мы все-таки немного пр: Perfect! So we've made some progress after all!
Сделали такой крюк, чтобы оказаться на д: We made such a detour to end up on the other side...
Now it will be a shortcut.
Эта калитка ведет прямо ко мне домой! Ок:
This gate leads straight to my house! 
Turns out it's just around the corner.
С этой стороны забора все выглядит еще б:
From this side of the fence, everything looks even more 
abandoned, than in your courtyard.
Прямо под калиткой вырос большой вьющийс:
A large climbing shrub has grown right under the gate. 
Its branches are woven into the door hinges, the handle and 
each unevenness on the door. 
They completely block the path
Теперь понятно, почему я не мог пройти с:
Now it's clear why I couldn't open it from the other side. 
Well... it's not that hard to clean up.
Вот мы и подошли, дальше идут земли клан:
Here we are, the clan lands are up ahead. 
From now on, we need to move very carefully and...
Правильно! Я про это и говорю!: Right! That's what I'm talking about!
Да нет же! Прямо сейчас! Замри! Слышишь?: No! Right now! Freeze! Got it?
Хм. Ну боятся каждого шороха тоже не нуж: Hm... Well, don't need to be afraid of every rustle either...
Они убежали. Вернутся с подкреплением, б:
They ran away. They will return with reinforcements, they will 
search... 
Oh, it's bad. Very, very bad!
We need to get out of here.
А вдруг они потом усилят охрану?! Мы уже:
What if they increase treir security? 
We won't be able to come here anymore!
Да и плевать! Своя шкура ценнее!: I don't care! I value my life more!
Сдаться?! Испугаться?! Ну уж нет!: Surrender? Run from fear? Hell, no!
Вот что. Пока они не подняли шума, я поп:
Here's what. Before they see us, I'll try to slip through unnoticed. 
You stay here.
Фагоп живет в отдалении. И он, вроде как:
Fagop lives further away. And he's kind of a friend. 
I'll get to him, sit it out. Everything will be fine.
dialogs_lunar_swamp_Ну вот мы и на месте: So, this is the spot. There's a direct path to your house.
dialogs_lunar_swamp_Извини, что втянула: Sorry for dragging you into it like that.
dialogs_lunar_swamp_Я не думала, что ляг:
I never thought the frogs would start a hunting season on you.
They seem to be on edge due to the epidemic.
dialogs_lunar_swamp_Возможно, ничего бы:
Maybe this wouldn't happen if you told me everything
right away.
dialogs_lunar_swamp_Наверное да... извин: Yeah, probably... Sorry. Care to join me?
dialogs_lunar_swamp_Сейчас мне нужно соб: I need some time to think now.
dialogs_lunar_swamp_Хорошо, я подожду. П:
Alright, I'll wait.
I'm gonna cook you something special for your return.
dialogs_lunar_swamp_Я буду тебя ждать. Д: I will be waiting for you. See you soon.
Системное_Вы вызвались помочь и достали: You volunteered to help and got the boy a ball!
Мастер фраза для определения максимально: Well, that old thing almost tore me to pieces for its gold! gold! gol
Тут водятся люди - это весьма обнадежива: People live here, so there's hope yet!
Не поздновато ли для пикника?: Isn't it a little late for a picnic?
А ты чего за мной идёшь? Сидел бы у кост:
Why are you following me? 
You could have stayed by the fire.
Можно, я с вами? Одному тут так жу-у-утк:
Can I go with you? 
It's too s-scary to be here all alone...
И то правда! Ладно, пойдём, будешь ветки: True. Fine, let’s go, you’ll be carrying the branches.
Из этих веток мы можем соорудить крышу!: From these branches we can build the roof!
Выглядит крепкими. Надеюсь, их не снесёт: They look solid. Hope won’t be blown away by another storm.
Так-так, а это у нас тут что?: Well, well, what do we have here?
Не твоя ли овца тут топталась?: Was your sheep walking all over here?
Да-да! Это её следы! Но мы сюда не подхо:
Yes, yes! These are her tracks! 
But we didn't come here - too close to the Dark Forest.
Hmm... these tracks look somewhat... chaotic...
It is not at all clear where they are leading.
Э-эх, бедная Ханна! Испугалась, наверно,:
Oh, poor Hannah! 
She was scared and that's why, probably, rushed in 
different directions...
Эх, этого маловато для шалаша! Давайте е:
Well, this is not enough for a hut! 
Let’s look for something else!
Из этого сухого кустарника можно сделать: This dry shrub can be used to make soft bedding...
Да уж, так получше, чем на голой земле с: Yes, it’s better than sleeping on bare ground.
Тут что-то странное в траве!: There is something strange in the grass!
Нет, тут трава примята - будто кто-то бо:
No, the grass is trampled as if someone big lay here, and the

Это Ханна в репейник влезла. Я ей шерсть:
Hannah got into the burdock. 
I was cleaning her, and she was kicking me!
Что думаешь: эти доски подойдут для карк: Do you think these boards will work for the frame?
Да, эти подойдут. Всё равно мост разруше:
Yes, these will do fine. 
The bridge is destroyed anyway...
Смотри, тут какие-то следы: вот копыта,:
Look, there are some footprints here! 
Hooves here, and next to them... these are human, but must be 
some kind of a midget...
А копыта - Ханны. Мы по мосту сюда и при:
And the hooves are Hannah’s. 
We came here from across the bridge before the storm hit.
Это мост в деревню, к людям?: Is this a bridge to the village, to the people?
Yes, it is. Was... 
Hope they are looking for Hannah and me...
А ничего такой получился! Не дворец, кон:
It actually looks nice! Not a palace, of course, but you can spend

We won’t get any sleep tonight...
Да ладно тебе! Сейчас починим. Подумаешь: Come on! We’ll fix it right away. It’s just wind...
А толку-то? Опять ветер снесёт... Тут ну:
What’s the point? 
The wind will blow it away again... 
We need thicker branches.
Крепкие раскидистые ветки можно найти в:
Firm, spreading branches can be found in 
the Dark Forest, but I’m afraid to go there...
Не паникуй так, не маленький уже! Где эт:
Stop panicking! You’re not a little boy anymore! 
Where is this forest of yours?
There it is, to the east from here...
Пойдём, малой! Там мы точно найдём нам к:
Let’s go, lad! 
We will definitely find a roof for us there!
Вот это ветки! Такие ветер точно не снес:
These are some branches! No wind will blow these away, that’s 
for sure!
Хватайте их и давайте скорее уйдём отсюд: Grab them and let’s get out of here as fast as we can...
Нет, но я нашёл её колокольчик! Он зацеп: No, but I found her bell! It caught on a bush.
Да уж, видимо, твоя овечка решила пережи:
Well, looks like, your sheep decided to sit out the storm in the 
forest.
Её там кто-нибудь съест, а наша семья ос:
Someone will eat her there, and our family will lose its 
last sheep...
Слушай, пастушок, давай уже отдохнём, а:
Listen, shepherd boy, let’s get some rest. And in the morning, 
we’ll think of something.
We need to find better branches...
Вот теперь-то уж точно не развалится!: Now it won’t fall apart anymore!
Вот это громадина! Почти как дом!: It’s so big! Almost like a house!
А оставшиеся ветки на костёр пустим. Тво:
We’ll use the remaining branches for the fire. 
Yours is almost dead already...
I know these flowers: they heal wounds.
А где вы достали такое вкусное крабовое: Where did you get such delicious crab meat?
Улыбнись, красотка, мы сорвали куш!: Smile, gorgeous, we hit the jackpot!
Весь город шумит, да?: The whole city is abuzz, right?
Сегодня мы зашли в порт с полными трюмам:
Today we entered the port with full holds, and by evening they 
were empty!  
Who knew that our product would be in such demand!
Должно быть тебе было так одиноко!: You must have been so lonely!
Отпиваешь из кружки и с грохотом ставишь: You drink from the mug and slam it on the table.
Но теперь-то я на земле! Надо найти музы:
But now I am back on land! Need music! 
And more wine! Let’s have a party!
А еще устроим гонки местных кучеров! Соб:
We’ll also arrange a race for local coachmen! 
Let’s gather all the drivers in the town!
А ты не боишься спустить все жалованье в: Aren’t you afraid to spend all your money on the very first day?
Сегодня весь мир стоит передо мной на ко: Today the whole world kneels before me!
Ох, милая, ты бы знала, в какую бурю мы: Oh, honey, if only you knew what horrible storm we got into!
Такой красавчик мог утонуть?: Could such a handsome man drown?
Ха! Я такой болтливый, но ты-то не можеш: Ha! I’m so chatty, but you can’t do everything at the same time.
Well. You tell me, and I’ll listen.
We were caught in a storm. There was this fog...
Он был неестественным. Зловещим. За тума:
It was unnatural. Ominous. 
You couldn’t see anything behind the fog. 
Everything was so quiet like... in a grave.
А потом вдруг поднялся шторм!: And then suddenly this storm arose!
Не просто волны - словно сама вода ожила:
Not just waves - as if the water itself came to 
life and opened its mouth!
Ветер бешеный, я еще не видел ничего под:
This mad wind...
I had never seen anything like it!
Одним мощным порывом ветер сорвал такела:
One blast - and the wind ripped off the rigging like a spider web 
in an old barn.
В последний момент я ухватил за канат, ч: I grabbed the rope at the last second not to lose the sail...
И начал бороться с ветром. Парус рвал вп:
And began fighting the wind. The sail rushed forward, I pulled it 
back, but the gusts became more frequent.
Но ты не уступал, верно?: But you didn’t give in, did you?
Да? Я тебе нравлюсь?: It has? Do you like me?
Она едва заметно улыбнулась, закусила гу:
She smiles faintly, bites her lip and runs her nose over the tip of 
the cock.
Ну так чего же ты ждешь?: So what are you waiting for?
Плохой сон приснился?: Did you have a bad dream?
Вы слышали? Откуда-то из леса... Охо-хо-:
You heard it too? It’s coming from somewhere in the forest. 
Oh! Where is my Hannah? My sheep... lost...
Эй, малой, хватит воду лить! Я и так вес:
Hey lad, stop crying! 
I’m already all wet from that dew!
Ох! Вы же не боитесь Тёмного леса, Мисте: Oh! You are not afraid of the Dark Forest, mister Eirik, are you?
Ха-ха! Ну ты скажешь! Чего там бояться?:
Ha-ha! Funny! What is there to be afraid of? 
Will the cones attack me or what?
Не могли бы вы тогда сходить в Тёмный ле: Could you then go to the Dark Forest and find Hannah?
Чёрт с тобой, уговорил! Пойду поищу твою:
Hell with you, fine! 
I’ll go look for your curly-haired girlfriend.
Жутковатый лёс... Без надобности мне там:
Eerie forest... 
I don’t have to go there without a good reason!
Мистер Эйрик, не стоит заходит в глубь т: Mister Eirik, you shouldn’t go deep into the Dark Forest!
Мистер, Эйрик! Вы нашли Ханну?!: Mister Eirik! Did you find Hannah?
Ну, почти... Я напал на её след - теперь:
Well, almost. I picked up her trail - now she’s not going 
anywhere from me!
Ты мне лучше вот что скажи... ты в трава:
You better tell me this... do you know anything 
about herbs?
Ну, не так как моя тётушка, но лопухи от:
Well, not like my aunt, but I can tell burdocks from 
dandelions!
Расспросить про Лилию долин: Ask about Lily of the valley
А что это за цветок такой - Змеиная голо:
And what kind of flower is this Dracocephalum? 
Does it bite?
Он очень ядовитый! Сын нашего конюха одн:
It’s very poisonous! 
The son of our groom once fell into its bush on his face 
and lost his eye!
Да уж, какое бессердечное растение! А ка: What a heartless plant! What does it look like?
Вот, как пасть змеи и выглядит! Цветок у:
Yes, it looks like a snake’s mouth! It has big, purple 
flowers and a long leg.
И солнце не любит - всегда в тени растёт:
And it doesn’t like the sun - it always grows in the shade. 
Even blooms at night!
Может, ты ещё и Лилию долин сможешь расп: Maybe you can also recognize the Lily of the valley?
Конечно! Это же любимый цветок Грай!: Yes, of course! It is Grai’s favorite flower!
Как по мне - ничего особенного: маленьки:
As for me - nothing special: small white flowers-calyxes and 
huge leaves.
А ты знаешь, как выглядит Кровохлёбка?: Do you know what Sanguisorba looks like?
Хммм... я не уверен, но вроде бы настойк:
Hmmm... I’m not sure, but I think my aunt sold a tincture 
from its root to hunters...
У Кровохлёбки здоровенный корень - почти: Sanguisorba has a thick root - almost like a tree!
А с виду - обычная прибережная трава. У:
But looks just like the grass that grows on the shore. 
Its flowers are like red cones...
Я, вообще-то, всегда держу слово!: I always keep my word, you know!
Да? А где же Ханна?: You do? Then where is Hannah?
Your sheep is in the forest, not far from here. 
Fell into a pit, poor thing...
Как там Ханна, мистер Эйрик? Вы с ней по:
How is Hannah, mister Eirik? 
Are you getting along with her?
Кхм. Да ничего, боится она. Скажи-ка мне:
Hm. It’s nothing, she’s just afraid. 
Tell me this...
Откуда у тебя овечка?: Where did you get the sheep?
Давно у тебя овечка?: How long have you had that sheep?
Давно. Ее купили, когда я совсем маленьк:
It’s been a long time. 
They bought her when I was still a boy.
Говорят, предыдущий хозяин продал ее, по:
They say, her previous owner sold her because he thought she 
was old, but look at her! 
She's actually very quick and young. Very young.
Да? Сколько же ей лет?: You think? How old is she?
Не знаю. Дядя Виктор говорит, что двадца:
Don't know. Uncle Victor says he used to shear her twenty years 
ago. 
But he's just crazy, no sheep lives that long.
А чем ты кормишь свою овцу? У неё есть л:

Сестра будет мной гордится!: My sister will be proud of me!
Я на ферме живу, вместе с сестрой. Крепо:
I live on a farm with my sister. 
There is also a fortress...
А за Крепостью? Я просто пытаюсь понять,:
And beyond the Fortress? 
I'm just trying to figure out where I am...
There's a road further to the center of the island...
Так это остров? Уже что-то!: So this is an island? That's something!
Ну, конечно остров! А вы что думали?:
Well, of course it's an island! 
What did you think?
Port? Well, fishermen are usually farther north...
Нет-нет, не рыбаки! Настоящий порт!: No, no, not fishermen! A real port!
Ну там... Торговцы из дальних стран, гул: You know... Merchants from distant lands, walking sailors, girls?
I don't know what you mean...
It's time to go to bed, Simen the Bravest.
Мистер Эйрик, а вы ведь не боитесь Темно: Mr. Eirik, you're not afraid of the Dark Forest, are you?
А что? Хочешь, чтобы я за овечкой твоей:
Why are you asking? 
Do you want me to go look for your sheep?
Ну она там совсем-совсем одна! Я должен:
Well, she's all alone there! 
I had to take care of her, and instead...
Ну все! Хорош причитать, малой! Найду я:
That's it! Enough of that pity party, kid! 
I'll find your curly-haired friend.
Правда?! Спасибо, мистер Эйрик! Вы такой:
Really? Thank you, Mr. Eirik! 
You are so kind!
Не выдумывай! Все одно, пока мост к дере:
Don't! It's nothing. 
While the bridge to the village is being repaired, all I can do is 
gather cones or something.
So at least I'll look around.
Just be careful in the woods, okay?
I'll wait for you here...
Ha! So brave! All righty, I'll be back soon.
О! еще у нее корень длинный, на хлыст по: Oh! It also has a long root, looks like a whip!
(Кровохлебка... Мне нужно взять ее корен:
(Burnet... 
I need to take its root and crush it.)
(Лилия долин... Мне нужно было выжать со:
(Lily of the Valley... 
I need to squeeze the sap out of its leaves.)
(Змеиная голова... Я должен срезать ее б: (Dracocephalum... I have to cut off its bud.)
Ханна встала на четверенки и повернулась: Hannah gets on all fours and turns to you.
Мистер, зачем мы идём на берег?: Mister, why are we going coast?
Эйрик (норма)_Вот эти ветки отлично пойд: These branches would be great for a hut, don't you think?
Симен (испуг)_М-мистер Эйрик, а вы не бо:
M-Mr. Eirik, aren't you afraid to come so close to the Dark
Forest? There are monsters there!
Эйрик (норма)_Ты это о чём, какие чудови: What are you talking about, what monsters?
Симен (испуг)_Да все о них знают! Они, к:
Everyone knows about them! They walk on two legs like us, but
they're angry, hairy, with animal faces...
Эйрик (норма)_Ха-ха, как скажешь, Симен!: Ha-ha, whatever you say, Simen! I like to tell stories too!
Эйрик (норма)_Это был мост к цивилизации: That was the bridge to civilization, right?
Симен (норма)_Ага, мы с мисс Ханной по н:
Yeah, that's how Miss Hannah and I came here. Across the river,
on the left, is our farm. And if you go right, there's an outpost.
Симен (норма)_Я думаю, когда увидят, что:
I think when they see that the bridge is broken, they'll send a
worker from the outpost.
Симен (норма)_Тогда нас отсюда вытащат!_: Then they'll get us out of here!
Эйрик (норма)_Давай возьмём здесь пару д: Let's get a couple of planks from here.
Эйрик (норма)_Мост всё равно разрушен, а:
The bridge is destroyed anyway, and they will serve us well as a
carcass for a hut.
Эйрик (норма)_Вот из этого можно будет с:
We can make a cloth out of this... Hmm, why is the bush
crumpled?
Симен (норма)_Мы тут игрались с мисс Хан: We were playing with Miss Hannah here.
Симен (норма)_Да, её! Зацепилась за куст: Yes, it is! It got stuck in the bush, I guess.
Эйрик (норма)_Как хоть выглядит эта твоя: What does this Miss Hannah of yours look like?
Симен (норма)_У неё тоненькие ножки, бол: She has thin legs, big eyes... She is beautiful!
Системное (на весь экран)_Вы собрали все:
You've collected everything you need to build a hut.
Return to the fire!
Эйрик (норма)_Так где я оказался? Что эт: So where did I end up? What place is this?
Симен (норма)_Ну, мы за рекой, там берег: Well, we are beyond the river, there is a shore...
Эйрик (норма)_Нет, это понятно, я в цело: No, that's clear, I'm asking in general! What kind of land is this?
Симен (норма)_За рекой человеческая земл: There is human land beyond the river. Here, I guess, is no one's.
Эйрик (норма)_Так это континент, остров?: So is this a continent or an island?
Эйрик (норма)_Уже что-то! И как остров н: That's something! And what is the island called?
Эйрик (норма)_Ясно, дружок, ты не знаешь: I see, my friend. You don't know...
Эйрик (норма)_Обычно я неплохо ориентиру:
I'm usually pretty good at navigating by the stars, but here
I don't see a single familiar constellation... Very strange.
Эйрик (норма)_Как тебе похлёбка?_dialogs: How do you like the soup?
Симен (норма)_Вкусно! Где вы достали кра: Delicious! Where did you get the crab meat?
Эйрик (норма)_Напал тут на меня один бан:
One fella attacked me here. But it's not my first time, I dealt
with him with my bare hands!
Симен (норма)_А мне сестра запрещает под:
And my sister forbids me to go near the crabblers. She says
that one of these can even hurt a child.
Симен (норма)_Взрослым, конечно, бояться: Of course, adults have nothing to fear!
Эйрик (норма)_Ну, смотря какого он разме: Well, it depends on how big it is, um, I got one the size of a horse!
Эйрик (норма)_Так ты сюда с крабблерами: So you came here to fight the crabblers?
Симен (норма)_Нет. Я сказал ребятам с за:
No. I told the guys at the outpost that I would go to the Dark
Forest and bring them a sapling of the Devil's Tree.
Симен (грусть)_Хотел доказать им, что я: I wanted to prove to them that I am not a coward.
Симен (грусть)_Просидел тут полдня, но т:
I sat here for half a day, but I still couldn't bring myself to go 
into the forest. And then the storm started...
Эйрик (норма)_А мисс Ханна здесь что дел: And what was Miss Hannah doing here?
Симен (грусть)_Ну, она всегда со мной, п: Well, she's always with me, supporting me.
Эйрик (норма)_Так она вроде как твоя ста: So she's like your older friend?
Симен (грусть)_Наверное. Сейчас она совс: I guess so. Now she's all alone, in the forest...
Эйрик (норма)_Слушай, Симен, я попробую: Listen, Simen, I'll try to look for her tomorrow!
Эйрик (норма)_Конечно! Но только утром._: Of course! But only in the morning.
Эйрик (норма)_Боюсь, ночью я сам заблужу: I'm afraid I'll get lost in this damn forest myself at night.
Эйрик (норма)_Так что, какие тут есть го: So, are there any towns nearby?
Симен (норма)_Тут недалеко Южная застава: There's Southern Outpost not far from here.
Эйрик (норма)_Хорошо, а какой-нибудь кру: Okay, and what about a larger city around here?
Эйрик (удивление)_Замечательно! И как эт: Wonderful! And what's the name of this capital?
Эйрик (норма)_Ну конечно... А есть тут в: Of course... Is there a port around here?
Эйрик (норма)_Нет-нет, не рыбаки, настоя: No, no, not fishermen, a real port!
Эйрик (норма)_Ну там... Торговцы из даль: Well, you know... Traders from distant lands, merry sailors, girls?..
Симен (норма)_Я не понимаю, о чём вы._di: I'm sorry, I don't understand you.
Эйрик (норма)_Так про этот лес у вас тут: So this is the forest you're telling these scary stories about, huh?
Симен (норма)_Ну... Да. Мы ведь за рекой: Well, yeah. We're beyond the river, that's the forest monsters land.
Симен (испуг)_Ага. На луг и к берегу они:
Yep. They don't go to the meadow or the shore, but forest's full
of them...
Эйрик (норма)_Ха-ха-ха! Ладно, Симен, ты: Ha-ha-ha! Okay, Simen, have you ever heard of mermaids?
Симен (норма)_Когда-нибудь я вырасту, пр:
Someday I'll grow up, come to the forest and fight all the
monsters there!
Симен (испуг)_Вы слышали мисс Ханну ночь: Did you hear Miss Hannah at night?! She screamed in the forest!
Эйрик (норма)_Не, не слышал. Где-то поср:
No, I didn't hear her. Somewhere in the middle of the night, I think
I heard a sheep bleating, but that's all.
Эйрик (удивление)_Ты хочешь сказать, что: You mean to say that your friend, Miss Hannah, is a sheep?!
Эйрик (удивление)_Ты же говорил, что она: But you said that she was dark, curly, thin-legged!..
Симен (испуг)_Так вы поможете? Она где-т:
So you'll help? She is somewhere in the forest, and she's
probably so scared...
Симен (печаль)_Да и сестра меня прибьет,: And my sister will kill me if I lose the last sheep!
Эйрик (норма)_Ох... Ладно уж, найду я тв: Oh... Allright, I will find your "Miss Hannah", as I promised!
Симен (норма)_Спасибо вам, мистер Эйрик!: Thank you, Mr. Eirik! You are very-very kind!
Эйрик (норма)_Не выдумывай! Пока мост чи:
Don't make things up! While they will be repairing bridge, there's
nothing to do here anyway, but at least I'll have a look around.
Симен (норма)_Если что, она туда побежал: You see, she ran this way, straight into the forest.
Эйрик (норма)_А тебе не страшно будет ту: Won't you be afraid to stay here all by yourself?
Симен (норма)_Ой, нет, я тут часто гуляю: Oh, no, I often walk here.
Симен (печаль)_Я к Тёмному лесу подходит: I am only afraid to go near the Dark Forest...
На этому лугу полно цветов, и вы не може:
This meadow is full of flowers, and you can’t cut them all at once!
You must figure out which flowers you need. Shepherd Simen
can give a spoken description, and flower guide can be found at
Marigold's.
Мастер фраза для определения максимально: Well, that old thing almost tore me to pieces for its gold! gold! gol
Looks like I'm fine. Nothing's broken.
Да тут целый подземный особняк!: There is a whole underground castle in here!
Камин вроде горит... Попрятались что ли?: Well, the fireplace is burning... Are they hiding?
I was just looking for my hairpin.
I'm sorry, I must have hit my head pretty hard. I'm seeing a fox.
Гровф... Смотри какой натуралист! Лучше: Growf... What a naturalist! You'd better watch your step.
Там овечка критически похорошела!: That sheep just had a hell of a change in appearance!
Она превратилась... В кого-то по типу те:
She's turned... 
She looks something a lot like you, but she's no fox. 
She's a sheep!
No, it didn't! That potion was supposed to... wait... 
You knew?
Ничего я не знала. Она вообще могла оказ:
I didn't know anything. 
She could have turned out not to be a dormant furry, but just an 
ordinary sheep.
Да и зелье могло не сработать, я его не: The potion could also have failed. I never tested it.
Кем-кем она могла не оказаться?: What could she be, you say?
Дремлющим фурри, я тебе не говорила? Оди:
A dormant furry. Didn't I tell you? 
They are like me only wild, unable to speak or change.
Они могут даже не знать, кто они такие,:
They may not even know who they are, but with my potion we 
can bring back so many!
Да, я понимаю, что ты тоже очень рад. Мо:
Yes, I know you're very happy too. 
You can consider yourself my apprentice and my main donor, of 
course!
Так вот оно что! Ты с самого начала все: So, that's what this is! You planned all of this!
Заперла бедную овечку под замок, врала м:
You locked that poor sheep, lied to me to get that "necessary 
ingredient"...
Она не овечка, Эйрик! Вернее не просто о:
She's no sheep, Eirik. Or she's not just a sheep. 
I changed nothing. 
I only brought back a part of who she was.
Если бы ты откатился обратно к... кем ты:
If you reverted back to... who were you before? 
A baboon? If you became a monkey again, I would have brought 
you back too!
Все, Эйрик! Я вижу, тебе нужно собраться:
Enough, Eirik. I can see you need to think about this. 
Sorry, I have to work.
Нет, Клови, нет! Не ходи туда!: No, Klovi, no! Don't go there!
Эта свора разорвет тебя! Я не могу отдат:
They will tear you apart! 
I can't give you to these dogs!
You were having a bad dream.
Это не твое дело, Эйрик. Зачем пришел?:
None of your business, Eirik. 
Why did you come here?
Просто хотел проведать. Я не знал, что т:
Just wanted to see you. 
I didn't know you were sleeping.
And then when I heard you screaming... 
I thought I should wake you up.
Ладно, извини, что потревожил. Я пойду,:
Fine, sorry for bothering you. 
I should probably go.
Все еще приходит в себя. Почему ты сама:
Still adjusting. 
Why won't you come check yourself?
Я только заставлю ее еще больше нервнича:
That would only make her more nervous. 
I think you can handle her pretty well.
Ага, вдруг вам пригодится. Я его почти н:
Yes, maybe you will need it. 
I barely wore it. Looks too peasant-y to me.
I don't think I want to know what that is...
Нет... Нет, не показалось! И правда лиса:
No... I'm not imagining it! It really is a fox! 
Wearing clothes, standing on two legs... 
And it talks!
Ну ты же тоже зачем-то говорящий. Чего к:
You talk too, for some reason. 
And why are you screaming like that?
Я много где был, много всякого видел, но:
I’ve been to many places, seen a lot, but this... 
Who taught it to speak?
Ее? Ты ко мне обращаешься?: It? Are you talking to me?
Да, к вам!.. А вы... А вы кто?:
Yes, I am talking to you! And you... 
Who the hell are you?
Меня зовут Мэригольд. Я алхимик. Живу зд:
My name is Merigold. I’m an alchemist. I live here away from 
everyone and really don’t like unexpected visitors. 
Would you be so kind as to introduce yourself too?
А заодно объясни, зачем ко мне в дом вло:
And, while you’re at it, please explain why did you break 
into my house?
Так этот мех и уши, это что же, результа:
So, the fur and ears... Is this the result of some alchemical 
experiment?
Нет, это я в маму, но ты так и не ответи:
No, it’s because I take after my mother, and you still haven’t 
answered my question. 
Who are you?
Мое имя Эйрик, я моряк. Служу на корабле:
My name is Eirik. I’m a sailor, serving on "Mary Rose". 
It's a ship...
А мама у тебя выходит тоже лиса?: So... is your mother a fox too?
Фр-р! Ну да, я фурри, дурень. Ты что, ле:
Yarf! Well, yes, I’m a furry, fool. Didn’t you hear the legends? 
I thought they’ve been scaring you people with stories about 
us since you were little.
Не слышал никогда. Я, конечно, здесь нед:
I have never heard of them. And you. 
Of course, I only just got here...
Ну здесь, на этом острове. Я разных дико:
Well, here, as in this island. 
I’ve seen some very curious things in my life, but talking foxes... 
What did you call yourself? Furry?
И туман тут странный... К вам вообще кор: And this strange fog... Do ships come through here at all?
Корабли через туман не ходят, уж рыбак-т: Ships can't go through the fog. Some fisherman you are!
Эй! Никакой я не рыбак! Мы не круги вокр:
Hold your horses! I'm no fisherman! 
We don’t run around catching fish, we're floggin the oggin, 
you know!
Говорю же, служу на \"Мэри Роуз\". Мы шл:
I told you, I serve on "Mary Rose". 
We were sailing across the ocean to make a delivery, but 
crashed...
Ты не с острова?! Немыслимо... Как же ту:
Wait, you’re not from the island? That’s impossible! 
How did the fog let you in?
Выходит, никуда он нас не пустил, корабл:
Well, it didn’t! The ship is at the bottom of the sea... 
Ah, damn it! If ships can’t travel through the fog, then it means 
I’m stuck here!
Корабль потонул, но ты выжил! Это странн: The ship sank, but you survived! So odd...
Подожди, матросик, мне нужно кое-что пос: Wait, little sailorman, I need to check something.
Ты видишь ухоженное помещение, прекрасно: You see a tidy room. It's well-lit despite there being no windows.
Вокруг склянки, книги и заметки на неизв:
There are vials, books and notes in an unknown language 
all over the place. 
The mistress must be up to her ears in work and barely ever 
sees the sun.
Стол с ингредиентами выглядит весьма пуг:
The table with the ingredients looks very distressing: 
dry rat tails and someone's claws on a string share the same 
space with garlic roots and fresh mint.
Ну что ты нашла в своих книгах? Древнее:
Well, found anything in your books? 
Some ancient prophecy about a Chosen one, who will one day 
disperse the fog around the island?
Не говори ерунды! Туман не имеет к тебе:
Don't be daft! The fog has nothing to do with this. 
Do not think my purely scientific interest has something to do 
with you.
Ладно, Эйрик, начнем сначала. Зачем ты к:
Fine, Eirik. Let's try this again. 
Why did you break into my house? 
Picked the lock, scraped your knees? 
Why do all that?
Ты же едва выжил? После крушения вроде д:
You barely survived, didn't you? 
After a crash like that you should have run straight to your 
kind - not roam the woods.
Да я просто овцу искал. Тут мальчик один:
I was looking for a sheep. That's it. 
There's a boy here, a shepherd boy. 
He lost a sheep. 
So I decided to go look for it everywhere.
Искал овечку? И часто ты выполняешь пору:
Looking for a sheep? 
Do you often run errands for people you barely know?
Бывает. Ты ее кстати нигде не видела?: It happens. Have you seen it by any chance?
Что-то припоминаю... Слушай, а ведь у ме:
I'm starting to remember something... 
Listen, I also have a small errand for you.
А я не нянька всяким овцам! Я ведь почти:
And I'm no nursemaid to lost sheep! 
I almost remembered where I saw it. 
Almost, Eirik!
Знаешь, что поможет мне вспомнить? Шампу:
Know what can help me remember? 
An herbal shampoo. I'm shedding fur and it needs better care.
Когда принимаешь теплую ванну очень хоро: A warm bath helps me think, you see!
What does that have to do with me? 
I have no shampoo.
Да я сама его сварю, это не сложно. Сход:
It's all right, I can make it. It's not so difficult. 
I just need someone to gather some herbs for me.
Хорошо, соберу я тебе твои травы, скажи: Fine, I'll bring you your herbs. Just tell me first...
Ты сказала, что ты \"фурри\". Это такие:
You said you were "furry" or something. 
Are these straightwalking foxes?
Why only foxes? There are deer, birds...
Мне как раз говорящий олень недавно попа:
I actually saw a talking deer not long ago! 
So that means it was also...
Симен рассказывал, что в лесу живут чудо:
Simen said that monsters live in the woods... 
Did he mean creatures like you?
Could be. People are terrified of us.
Она резко наклонилась к тебе и оскалила: She suddenly leans over to you and bares her teeth.
Не, бояться вредно, только нервы портить: No. Fear is bad for your nerves.
Это хорошо. Вы, приматы, больно агрессив: Good. You primates are a bit too aggressive when frightened.
Пару месяцев назад нарвалась на двух ваш:
Saw two human hunters a couple months ago. 
They were so scared I barely made it out alive.
Так вы какая-то помесь между людьми и жи: So you're some kind of human-animal hybrid?
Помесь? Гровф, ты на себя посмотри! Ты г:
Hybrid? Growf, have you seen yourself? 
You said you visited many places. 
Have you seen monkeys and how much you're alike? 
It's obvious. To me, at least.
Задумался бы ты хоть разок о происхожден:
Have you even thought about once where your species comes
from? 
If you had, you would be much less shocked that I exist.
Если тот олень - как ты, почему он выгля:
If that deer was just like you, then why did he look different? 
He didn't have clothes and walked on fours...
Just your usual deer. Only it talked.
Да такой же он, просто думает, что в зве:
He's just like me. 
Simply thinks that looks scarier as an animal. 
Nothing but a boy! Tried to fight you, didn't he?
Ага, крепкий, сволочь! Пришлось его осад:
Yes, strong he was, damn him. 
Had to bring him down a peg.
Ну и правильно! Замучил по ночам на всю:
That's right! 
So sick of that rack with horns roaring across 
the clearing all night!
Откуда у вас это туман?: So what's this fog you have here?
Это очень старая магия. Великий туман бы:
It's very old magic. Ancient. 
The Great Fog was created to stop people coming from 
the mainland.
No one was supposed to come here.
Кому понадобилось изолировать целый остр: Who'd even want to isolate an entire island?
Ха! Кому-то, кто хочет выжить! Ты ведь н:
Hah! Someone who wants to live! 
You've never met furry anywhere else, have you? 
Why do you think that is?
Ты, алхимик, который живет отшельником в:
You're an alchemist and you live all alone in the woods like some 
hermit. 
Let me guess, you're trying to create a philosopher's stone or 
something?
They say it turns everything into gold.
Фу, гровлф! Эти ваши людские штуки! Куда:

Ask away.
That... dog. She's hurt. Because of me.
Ты ее ранил? Дай догадаюсь, она сама на:
You wounded her? Let me guess. 
She attacked you, you fought back, but then all of a sudden felt 
sorry for her. Right?
Я хочу, чтобы она поправилась. Можешь да:
I want her to get better. 
Can you give me some kind of advice?
Какой ты сердобольный! Ты ее тюкнул всег:
Soft-hearted, aren't you? You hit her just once. 
It will heal like a dog. Literally.
Ей просто нужно отлежаться, желательно в:
She just needs to rest, preferably in a dry warm place. 
She'll get better in time.
Вот как раз с сухим, теплым местом у мен: It's the dry warm place that I'm lacking.
Дома же есть камин?: Don't you have a fireplace in that house?
That house has been abandoned for quite some time.
Ну так подлатай его! Я думала ты умеешь: Well, then patch it up! I thought you were good with your hands.
Ну и лежанку ей устрой. Накидай соломы т:
And make her some sort of a bed. 
Throw some straw and old rags. 
I think, she'll like that.
Она отдохнет, залижет раны. Оглянуться н:
She can rest and lick her wounds. 
She'll be attacking people again in no time. 
You'll see.
I think she might be like Hannah.
Что “как Ханна”? Любит морковку?:
What do you mean by "like Hannah?" 
She likes carrots too?
Ну она понимает меня. Выглядит немного с:
She understands what I'm saying. 
Looks a bit odd and well, other things too.
Я смотрю на нее и мне так кажется. Я име:
I look at her and I feel like I'm right. I mean, I already know you 
and Hannah and I'm starting to understand what you are.
Вот как! Ты у нас теперь эксперт по дрем:
I see! 
So now you're an expert on dormant furries, huh?
Я скорее говорю про чуйку, знаешь. В кон:
More like a gut feeling, you know. 
After all, people can learn anything.
Это правда, люди быстро учатся. К большо: Yes, people do learn fast. Much to our great regret.
Ну ладно. Допустим она фурри. И что с то: Fine. Let's say, she is a furry. So what?
You could give me that potion...
Ого! Нет уж! Если она и правда фурри и т:
Oh, wow! No, I don't think so! 
If she is, indeed, one of us and you turn her back, I'm afraid to 
even imagine what you're going to be doing with her!
First, that's not necessarily true, and second... are you jealous?
Ревную? Да если это случится, ты будешь:
Jealous? 
If you do that, you'll be stinking like a dog all the time!
I'm not going to condone that smell. 
So, no, never, that's out of the question!
(Нужно будет попробовать зайти с другой:
(I should try to bring this up some other time. 
Now she doesn't even want to talk about it).
А ты уверена, что она собака?: Are you sure she's a dog?
Что ты хочешь от меня услышать? Абсолютн:
What do you want me to say? 
Absolutely, ironclad, no freakin' doubt, she's a dog. 
Satisfied?
It's just she looks more like a wolf.
Ну может какой-нибудь волк гульнул с дво:
Well, maybe some wolf scored with some dog. 
How would I know?
В таком случае это делает ее полуволком,: So that would make her half-wolf, right?
Если брагу разбавить вином, она не перес: If you add wine to beer, beer won't stop being beer.
Боже, Мэригольд, что у тебя не так с соб: God, Merigold, what have dogs ever done to you?
Ну что? Ты узнал все что хотел?: Well, you get all you wanted?
На случай, если ты собираешься продолжат:
In case you decide to be in contact with her more... 
Can you, I don't know, wash again before you come here?
Хотя ладно, не думай об этом. Все равно: You know what? Forget it. Won't help anyway.
Славно. Я уже все подготовила. Осталось:
Good. It's all ready. 
I just need to make that concoction and add it to the soap.
You can wait here.
Вот, держи! Возможно, это лучшее мыло в:
Here you go! 
This could be the best soap in the whole world! 
At least, in our situation.
Ведро и швабра в прихожей, сначала пройд:
The bucket and mop are in the hallway. 
Use soapy water first, then go over it a second time just to be 
sure it's all gone.
Oh, I really hope this all is worth it.
And, of course, don't forget to clean yourself up too.
Эм... Давай мы поговорим, когда ты закон: Um... Let's talk when you're finished, okay?
Ох, привет... хм... Так, я хочу сделать: Oh, hello... um... I was just making myself some tea.
Мэри не сделала даже глотка. Она просто:
Merigold didn't even take one sip. 
She just holds the cup with the tea by her nose, as if hiding 
behind it.
Ох, не обращай внимания. Это просто помо: Oh, just ignore it. It helps... you know... to kill that smell.
Тебе не кажется, что ты слишком зациклил: Don't you think you're too fixated on that?
Тебе легко говорить! У вас, людей, чуть:
Easy for you to say! 
You people possibly have the worst sense of smell in the world!
Вот как? Может, если это проблема для те:
Really? Maybe if this is such a problem for you, 
then you could find a more radical solution? 
Aren't you an alchemist or something?
Ты говоришь о яде? Я, конечно, недолюбли:
You mean, poison? 
Of course, I'm not very fond of dogs, but don't you think that's 
too radical?
What? No! If smells are a problem for you, then... 
I don't even know.
Может есть какое-то зелье, которое его н:
Is there maybe a concoction that can temporarily weaken your 
sense of smell?
Эйрик, ты и правда иногда можешь быть ос: Oh, Eirik, sometimes you can be really sharp-witted!
Бывает пыжишся, пыжишся, пытаешься пошут: You try to act all high and mighty or make a joke, but then... Oh!
Ха-ха-ха! Ты завел себе собачку, и из-за:
Ha-ha-ha! So you get yourself a dog and because of that 
I'm to lose my sense of smell? No smell, no problem, yes? 
Ha!
Um, yes-yes... I knew you'd like this one.
Но в чем-то ты прав!: Well, you are right to some degree.
Да. Я вроде как алхимик! Я знаю одно сре:
Yes. I am an alchemist of sorts. 
I know of a way to make that dog smell disappear!
Оно не замаскирует, а уничтожит его! Его:
It won't just mask it, it will destroy it! 
And it could be used as a soap additive later. 
Finally! You are a genius!
Решено. Тебе нужно будет найти пару-трой:
It's settled. 
You just have to find me a few buds of Ghostflower. 
Then you clean everything here, clean yourself up and voila! 
No more smell.
Ты хочешь, чтобы я убирался у тебя дома?: You want me to clean your house?
Я пыталась проветрить все комнаты после:
I tried to air all the rooms after your last visit, but... 
Anyway, that concoction and a good mopping would be quite 
useful.
Хотя погоди. Если я все сделаю, то запах: No, wait. If I do all that, will the smell be gone?
Мы же вроде только что об этом и говорил: Didn't we just talk about that, dear?
И ты, наконец, сможешь дать мне зелье?: And you will finally be able to give me the potion?
Зелье, которое пробуждает дремлющих фурр: Yes, the potion that helps to wake dormant furries.
Ты не хотела мне его давать, потому что:
You didn't want to give it to me, because you were afraid I would 
smell of dog even more.
Если у нас будет чудодейственное средств:
If we have the magic smell killer, there's no reason to worry about 
that!
Да ладно тебе! Я должен опять идти за ка:
Oh, come on! I have to go search for some herbs again and then 
clean your house...
Хорошо. Если ты все сделаешь, то я дам т: Fine. If you do all that, I will give you your damn potion.
По рукам! Что тебе нужно для твоего чудо: Deal! What do you need for your magic cure?
Невидимка. Она уничтожает некоторые запа:
Ghostflower. It destroys certain smells.
Dog or wolf smell, for example.
Hounds sometimes use it to get in somewhere unnoticed.
Разведчики из волчьего клана втирают ее:
Wolf scouts rub its buds into their fur. 
That helps them mask their smell for a short time.
Если принесешь мне три цветка - я сделаю:
If you bring me three flowers, 
I will make a concoction that will hold much longer!
Ну, Невидимки распускаются только ночь,:
Well, Ghostflower blooms only at night, and the Gloomy Grove 
is a lot more dangerous at nighttime.
Ты уже был там. По ней часто слоняется о:
You've been there already. 
That stupid deer-furry is usually roaming about that place.
Насколько мне известно, во всей округе Н:
As far as I know, it's the only closest place where Ghostflower 
grows.
I think I know where that is.
Ты уже был там. Через рощу ты ко мне и п:
You were already there. 
It was through the grove that you made your way to me. 
There are a lot of boars there, but if it's not a problem for you...
Here you go. Use it for a good cause and all that.
Тут происходит настоящая магия. Рецепт о:
This is where the real magic happens. 
The recipe is very ancient and complex and... 
Why did you come anyway?
Дым стоит столбом, его по всей округе ви:
That smoke, you can see it from everywhere. 
I thought there might be a fire.
Надеюсь, я не привлеку людей из поселени:
Hope I won't attract people from the settlement across the river. 
I would very much like to aviod them.
Не люблю, когда за мной гоняются с вилам: I don't like being chased with pitchforks.
dialogs_merigold_house_Значит, тебе пове:
Consider yourself lucky. No one will come here. The locals have 
cold feet showing up here in the woods.
dialogs_merigold_house_А мы не суемся к:
And we don't show up at their places! It's funny to think that you 
can just walk around and they will perceive you as one of their 
kind.
dialogs_merigold_house_Почему бы и нет?: Why so? It's not like I am too different from the locals.
dialogs_merigold_house_Отличаешься. Ты н: You are different. You don't want to kill me.
dialogs_merigold_house_Кх-кхм. Ну да. В:
Ahem. Well, yes. So anyway, the bridge was fixed, and I can now
have a walk to the nearest post.
dialogs_merigold_house_Заставы? Которая: Frontier post? The one next to the river?
Хочешь прикуплю тебе там чего-нибудь?: Do you want me to buy you something there?
Что именно? Эй, Мэригольд, ты слышишь ме:
What exactly? Hey Merigold, can you hear me? 
What do you want me to bring you?
После секундного молчания взгляд Мэригол:
After a moment's silence, Merigold's gaze suddenly cleared, and 
her pupils narrowed.
Слушай, а подай, пожалуйста, мне вот отт:
Listen, can you please give me that jar from there? 
See the shelves above? There is a jar of leeches.
Так. Перцы я дорезала, сейчас все будет:
That's it. 
I cut the peppers, everything will be ready soon.
Какое зелье, это суп!: What potion? This is a soup!
Ну мало ли какой у тебя рецепт. Ты же са:
Well, you never know what your recipe is. 
You yourself asked me to throw them there!
Я про перцы говорила! Я нарезала перцы и:
I was talking about the peppers! 
I chopped the peppers and wanted you to throw them into the 
soup - what's not clear?
Ну ты сказала достать банку пиявок, и я: Well, you said to get the leeches, and I thought ...
Ты сейчас серьезно? Могла бы нормально о:
Are you serious right now? 
You could have explained properly.
Ну извини, что испортил суп. Уверен, в с:
Well, I'm sorry for ruining the soup. 
I’m sure next time it will be even better.
Да плевать на суп! Лечебные пиявки с вос:
Damn the soup! Healing leeches from the eastern swamps - 
do you even know how much they cost me? 
Now I have to go to the clan of reptiles again, beg Fagop for 
a new jar, humiliate myself...
Зачем ты вообще попросила меня достать э: Why did you even ask me to get those leeches?
Ты меня хочешь сделать виноватой?! Я теб:
Do you want to make me the guilty party?
I've been helping you from the moment we met and all you do is 
cause trouble!
Ладно, ладно! Хочешь, я схожу к этому тв: Okay, fine! Do you want me to go to this Fagop of yours?
Oh... Nope. You can't do it.
Думаешь, клан позволит разгуливать челов:
Do you think the clan will let a human walk on their territory? 
You won't be able to sneak past the watchmen to their healer.
Не то, чтобы охрана очень сильная - это:
Not that the watchmen are very strong - they are not 
wolves after all. But you are clumsy, noisy and...
Эй! Если бы ты знала, сколько раз мне пр:
Hey! If you knew how many times I had to leave a tavern through
 the back door, you would not be saying that!
И что? Считаешь, что справишься?: So what? You think you can handle it?
К востоку на болотах есть поселение лягу:
To the east, in the swamps, lies a frog settlement. 
Fagop lives on the outskirts - he is their healer. 
You can make a deal  with him.
You need to get into his shack unnoticed. 
Tell Fagop that you are from me.
Только не попадись страже, я серьезно. Э: Just don't get caught, I'm serious. No one wants that.
Все будет хорошо, Мэригольд. Достану я т:
Everything will be fine, Merigold. 
I'll get you your leeches.
Хм, он и правда на это купился. Такой до: Hmm, he really fell for it. So very gullible...
Ладно, это к лучшему. Давно пора было по:
Okay, that's for the best. 
It was high time Fagop met him.
If you need me, I'm going to go clean myself up.
Ты хоть бы сказал!: Couldn't you give me a heads-up?
Ну наконец-то! Теперь так хорошо ты пахн: Finally! You smell so good now!
Рад слышать. Так как там наш уговор?: Happy to hear that. What about our deal?
Ты абсолютно уверен, что твоя собака - ф: Are you absolutely sure that your dog is a furry?
Не-а. Но по крайней мере стоит попробова: Nope. But we could at least try to find out.
Хорошо. Рецепт все тот же, как и основно:
Fine. The recipe is the same, as well as the main ingredient. 
I will wait for you here.
(Как быть? С одной стороны меня обманули:
(What do I do? On the one hand, I was deceived, 
but on the other, nothing terrible happened...)
Все эти травы растут тут, на лугу непода:
All these herbs grow here, in a meadow nearby where your 
shepherd boy is.
Что бросать? Перцы или пиявки?: Throw what? The peppers or leeches?
Ты отложил банку с пиявками и бросил пер:
You put away the jar of leeches and throw the peppers into the 
cauldron.
Ты почему поставил банку на самый край!: Why did you put the jar at the very edge!
Oops... I don't think I did.
Да ты что! Я едва коснулась стола, и она:
You don't say? I barely touched the table, and it fell. 
Holy roots, Eirik!
Аккуратнее надо быть! Чего ты так злишьс: You have to be more careful! Why are you so angry?
This is a very valuable jar, Eirik! Oh...
Эй полегче! Ты сама разбила свою банку,: Hey, easy! You broke your jar, and now you're telling me off!
Слушай, может быть, я и правда поставил: Listen, maybe I really put this damn jar at the edge, but...
Нет-нет, ты прав. Ты виноват лишь отчаст: No, no, you're right. You're only partly to blame...
Эти лечебные пиявки с восточных болот -:
These leeches are from the eastern swamps - they cost me a 
lot. Now I gotta go to the reptile clan again, beg Fagop for 
a new jar, humiliate myself...
Мэригольд жалобно пострела на тебя и едв: Merigold looks at you pitifully and whines faintly.
Ладно, хочешь, я схожу к этому твоему Фа: Fine, do you want me to go to that Fagop of yours?
Я не справлюсь!?: I can't do it, you say?
Не то, чтобы охрана очень сильная - это:
It's not that the security is very strong - it's not the Wolf clan 
after all. But you're clumsy and make so much noise and...
And it's dangerous in the swamps...
Серьезно?! Пугаешь меня болотной живност: Seriously? Are you scaring me with swamp dwellers?
Хм, ну если ты сам хочешь... тогда слуша: Hmm, well, if you want to... then listen.
Сначала нужно перейти через болота. Ты п:
First you need to cross the swamps. 
You'll know you're there when you see a passage in the form 
of a snake's mouth. The clan lands are down further.
Дальше держись левой стороны. Дом Фагопа:
Then keep to the left.
Fagop's house is further from the rest, you can approach, 
unnoticed. Tell Fagop that you're from me.
Только не попадись клановой страже, я се:
Just don't get caught by the clan guards, I'm serious. 
Nobody needs it.
Эх, Мэри, ты еще не знаешь, с кем имеешь:
Jeez, Mery. You don't know who you're dealing with here.
I can literally become a shadow!
I'll get you your leeches.
Как в старые добрые на гауб-вахте. Роман: Like in the good old days back at detention. So romantic!
Это медицинский справочник? Кажется, нау:
Is this a medical book? 
Seems to me that science was the last thing on the artist's mind.
Какая юная лисица. Наверное, Мэри тоже к:
What a young fox.
Meri must have been a young student once, too.
Учила свою алхимию в университете. Хитры:
Studied alchemy at the university under some sly fox professor 
watching her every step to success...
\"Мэригольд, это необходимо для нашего у: "Merigold, this is necessary for our lesson!"
\"Но я стесняюсь, профессор! Если я опущ: "But I'm shy, Professor! If I lower my tail, everyone will see..."
\"В том то и смысл, девочка! Мы на уроке:
"That's the whole point, dear girl!
We're in anatomy class, everyone should know this!"
\"Профессор прав! В анатомическом справо:
"The professor is right!
In the anatomy book, the tail is always
directed downwards, and that way, I don't understand anything!"
Вот видите Мэригольд? Вы подводите весь:
You see Merigold?
You are letting down your entire class!"
\"Я собирался прочитать лекцию. Ваше \"с:
"I was going to give a lecture. 
Your "just a little bit" is no good, I need material!"
\"Так вы хотите получить автомат по пред:
"So do you want to get an advanced standing on the subject 
or not?"
Well... Everything is much stricter here.
\"Все Мэригольд, шутки кончились, мне ну: "It's over, Merigold, no more jokes, I need to teach this class!"
\"Да. Просто стойте так и не мешайте лек: "Yes. Just stand there and don't interfere with the lecture."
\"Итак, ребята, что вы видите перед собо:
"So, students, what do you see before you? 
You, yes you, what do you see?"
\"Я вижу, что ей это нравится!\": "I can see that she likes it!"
\"Что вы об этом думаете, молодой челове: "What do you think about this, young man?"
\"Тонко наблюдение. К предстоящему экзам:
"Subtle observation. 
You don't have to prepare for the upcoming psychology exam. 
You've earned your A."
\"Ой... а мне вы завалили психологию...\: "Oh... but you flunked me at psychology..."
\"Потому что вы постоянно отвлекаетесь М:
"Because you are constantly distracted, Merigold! 
And distracting the others!"
\"Ну я... хорошо, я молчу.\": "Well, I am... fine, I'm not saying another word."
\"Почему же нет? Любопытство поощряется:
"Why not?
Curiosity is encouraged within the walls of this university."
dialogs_merigold_house_Оу... что-то по-н: Ohh... It must be something truly special.
dialogs_merigold_house_Я подглядела это: I looked up the recipe when I watched your hunters.
dialogs_merigold_house_Людьми. Это похле:
Humans. That's a stew. Not that good, but...
it's human soup. Thought you'd like it.
dialogs_merigold_house_Как ребро? Болит?: How's your rib? Does it hurt?
dialogs_merigold_house_Да ничего! Ну и п:
It's nothing! Well, that was some adventure.
These frogs with their holy swamps!
dialogs_merigold_house_Да они очень конс:
Yes, they are very old-fashioned.
And they don't love seeing me that much.
dialogs_merigold_house_Ну... я живу рядо:
Well... I live next to the people.
Picked stuff up from them.
dialogs_merigold_house_*Передразнивая кв:
*Imitating the croaking accent*
"Beli-i-ieve in my science!"
dialogs_merigold_house_Ха-ха! Пока ты ра: Ha-ha! While you were talking to this Gubble I...
dialogs_merigold_house_Эйрик, мы же дого: Eirik, we agreed this didn't happen!
dialogs_merigold_house_Да-да, я про друг:
Yeah-yeah, that's another thing.
I'm just curious, what did he mean?
dialogs_merigold_house_Он поэтому назвал:
Why did he call you a "rare species"?
Due to your passion for science?
dialogs_merigold_house_Тебе важно это зн: Do you really want to know?
dialogs_merigold_house_Ну... наверное, н:
Well... probably not. Hell with it!
You won't tell the truth either way.
dialogs_merigold_house_На острове больше:
There is no more furry foxes on the island.
We were all eliminated. My parents were killed.
My sister. My friends. Everyone.
dialogs_merigold_house_Кроме меня. Я жив:
Except me.
I live alone, not because I don't like the company.
I have no one.
dialogs_merigold_house_Я работаю над зел:
I'm working on a potion to awake the dormant furries,
hoping one day I'll stumble... on a fellow.
dialogs_merigold_house_Но это вряд ли сл: That is unlikely to happen. We were always a few.
dialogs_merigold_house_В общем... Вот по:
So yeah...
This is why he called me a "rare species".
This douchebag was mocking me.
dialogs_merigold_house_Всех лисиц... кто: All the foxes... Who did this to you?!
dialogs_merigold_house_Люди. Это было во: Humans did. It was during the war.
dialogs_merigold_house_Эйрик, им правда: Eirik, they really need your help.
dialogs_merigold_house_Лягушки видят в т:
The frogs see you as their enemy because none of the people
ever did them good. There were only wars.
dialogs_merigold_house_Так не обязательн:
It doesn't have to stay like this.
It can be different.
dialogs_merigold_house_Извини. я опять д: Sorry. I put pressure on you once more...
dialogs_merigold_house_Ты начал молча ес: You start eating your stew in silence.
Tasty! I mean... a regular hunter's stew.

dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Справедливо. Мы: Fair enough. We don’t even know what we are looking for.
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Да! Рокси и Эйр:
Yes! Roxy and Eirik the fighting squad! Screw stealth,
let's clear this dungeon!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Да! Хорошая раб: Yes! Good job, Roxy! I'm a beast, right?
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Слушай, почему:
Listen, why do you always talk about yourself in the third 
person? Roxy this, Roxy that?
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Не знаю. Мне нр:
Don't know. I like my name. It’s so new, it’s crunchy on the 
tongue! Is it bad? Confusing?
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_*шепотом* Тихо!:
*whispers*
Quiet! Someone is talking up ahead! If you want to listen in,
you need to move more quietly!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_*шепотом* Ну ты:
*whispers*
Well, you wanted to snoop around here, right?
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Святые набухшие: Holy swollen buds, not that again!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Нужно говорить:
You need to speak from the heart! And mind the rhyme!
The longing! And...
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Очертить алфави:
\fiWith my tongue in one's mouth
I could spell a sonet,
If only all the hints worked
And you just got it!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Нет не то! Хоро:
No, not that! Good, but not like that! You can’t say this right 
away, she’s ashamed of her nature! You need to tear her out of 
this! One more time...
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Ну не вечно ляг:
\fiOne shall not act a frog forever
Until their very last day!
Would you listen to my alluring suggestion,
The one I've been meaning to say!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Я ее как будто: It's like I'm blaming her! Not good! Maybe something like:
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_...хватить бало: ...\fiquit being so posh, let's start some debauche...
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_(Это Габл! Ага,: (It's Gubble! Uh-huh, this is getting interesting!)
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Фу, нет! Это то:
Ugh, no! This will only scare her away! We need something poetic,
something deep, heart wrecking!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Что-то в духе::
Something like: "You are, like, a ray of sunshine, tender and 
warm! And I’m cold-blooded, and we bathe in the sun, and..."
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Да! Вот оно! \":
Yes! This is it! "When it's cold, we frogs fall into stasis, and when
heat accelerates the blood flow we..."
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_\"И... и когда:
"And... and when it gets hot, I start moving faster...
If you get the hint!"
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_А? Габл, я... А:
Huh? Gubble, I... What's wrong?! I am a poet, a storyteller!
This is an ancient tradition!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Ты не сказатель: You are not a storyteller, you are a fornicator!
In your mind. Fornicator in your mind.
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Почему бы тебе: Why won't you find a normal girl? A good, real frog?
A frog is... Yes, a frog is a great option.
Oh, never mind. How was it? How's your speech?
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Дрянь. Меня пре:
Garbage. I was interrupted. I couldn't even say these words of 
your "main theses".
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Нет. Речь надо: No. The speech needs to be changed!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Вот так на лету: Just like that, on the go? What did you manage to say?
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_\"Если подпусти: "If you let humans near the springs, they will dry up”.
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Ты застрял в са: You got stuck at the very beginning?!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Говорил же, над: I told you it needs to be shorter!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Справедливости:
To be fair, your political position can be summed up to:
“Let’s leave it as is”...
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Так может сказа:
Any fool can say that! And I must reach the hearts
of my fellow tribesmen!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Достучатся до с:
\fiTo reach the hearts of my fellow tribesmen...\fr
Not bad, write it down. Okay, do you want a new speech?
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Да. Все изменил:
Yes. This rite changed everything. At first I was happy and
thought this was the true will of the Tree, and then I 
reconsidered...
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Это глупо! Если:
This is silly! If it was the will of the Tree, he would've died 
already! Someone poisoned the cup...
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Ты ведь не дума: You don't think it's me, do you?
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Ха-ха! С чего б: Ha ha! Why would I think that?
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Речь надо менят:
The speech needs to be changed. Now it sounds too... 
aggressive.
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Теперь можно по:
Now they might think that it was I who poisoned him!
And now I’m trying to deceive everyone and stage a coup!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_И как должна вы: And what should the new speech look like?
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Ну что вроде то:
Well, something like traditions violation is bad, but such a low 
act is also not good.
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Вождь неправ, ч:
The leader is wrong for inviting this monkey here, but we can’t
just kill him now, spitting on everything, doing whatever we 
please!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Эм... Знаешь, е:
Um... You know, if that's really what you wish to say, then
you don't have to give any speech at all.
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_То, что ты хоче:
What you want to say is pretty much clear. You can react to
the hearts of your fellow tribesmen with wise silence.
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_К тому же, буде: Plus, there will be fewer reasons to suspect you.
You think so? Oh... Maybe you're right. I shouldn't have just 
come here!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Что ты тут дела: What are you doing here, monkey!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Кто дал тебе пр:
Who gave you the right to meddle in our affairs?!
Who do you think you are, hmm?
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Ты грязная, вон: You filthy, stinky monkey! Lousy bastard!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Прячешься за пр:
Hiding behind the leader's orders! If he hadn't forbidden me
to touch you, then...
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Я бы пригвоздил: I would have nailed you on the spot!!!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Да! Ваше племя:
Yes! Your species does not know how to fight honestly,
you only attack as a pack!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Так что завязыв:
So quit being sarcastic! I see through you! You smile and 
swagger, but if it came to a fight, you would crawl away like 
a slug!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Ты выхватываешь: You draw your sword and rush forward!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_(Нет! Он УЖЕ за: (No! He is ALREADY behind your back!..)
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Наверное, ты пл: You probably didn't think well when you drew your weapon?
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_(Нет, я не конч:
(I'm not stupid! I won't be the first to draw a sword just because
this bastard is talking bullshit!)
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Да, думаю о том:
Yeah, I'm just wondering what it's like to be such a windbag.
If you want to nail me, here I am!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Ну и завали тог:
Well, then shut up your slurp! If you're not going to do shit,
why goggle?
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Чего ты хочешь?: What do you want? Chat me to death?
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Ну вот! Говорил: Here you go! I told you it wasn’t him!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Ну во-первых, о: Well, first of all, he could kill you just now.
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_А во-вторых, ты:
And secondly, you heard what they were talking about with that
second frog. He doesn't want to get involved at all!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Если это не Габ: If it's not Gubble, then who is it?
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Не, ты послушай: No, listen! I have proof, I saw everything!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Итак. Для начал:
So. First, I must say that when the whole tribe gathers in the 
square, it is a wonderful time. They are all there and you can 
run down the street without fear of being grabbed by the tail.
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Вчера вечером,:
Last night when everyone was there to greet you or something,
I realized that this was a great chance to take a walk to the 
garbage pit!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Я спокойно зани:
I was minding my own business 'cause I knew that I would 
hear in advance when the crowd disperses. 
I had plenty of time and...
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_И вдруг я услыш:
And suddenly I heard a quick stomp from behind! I also thought:
“Omg, who's fucking around there!” - and they were heading
straight to the trash pit!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Я не знаю. Я не: I don't know. I didn’t look, you know, I hid right away.
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Понятно, значит:
Got it, that means someone left the square earlier to throw away
some garbage.
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Да нет же, дуби:
No, you dumbass! I didn't tell you the most important thing!
I hid and then bam!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_И рядом со мной: And then right next to me falls \fithis!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Флакон из под я:
A poison bottle. Exactly the same as those in which Fagop 
stores his shitty poison!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Такая глиняная:
This clay flask with a disgusting image of a rat’s skull.
Empty, but recently uncorked. I could still smell the poison.
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Ого! Звучит как: Wow! Sounds like a real clue!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Да, и я про то:
That's what I’m talking about! Roxy found a clue! Then I thought:
“ew, poison, gross!” - and also: “Wow, strange!” - and now I get 
it!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Фагоп убежал с: Fagop ran from the square before others to get rid of this thing!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Хм... нет, это:
Hmm... no, it's not him. When I came to senses, he was there
helping Mary pump me out.
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Вряд ли он убег:
It is unlikely he ran away the square and then returned. And
he wouldn’t've had time to return. I wasn't off for that long.
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Тьфу, облом! Ла:
Ugh, bummer! Okay, it's someone else. But we know how to 
find this someone!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Нужно просто вс:
You just need to remember who of the tribe was not there
when you woke up! The one who was not there is the one 
who ran to throw away the empty bottle! The evidence!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Да это же нереа:
This is unreal! There was a whole crowd there, who would 
recall that? Anyone could sneak out of the square unnoticed.
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Да, но... я име: Yeah, but... I mean, it's a clue!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Ох, ладно, тебе: Oh, come on, there's no pleasing you!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Брось, Рокси, в:
Come on, Roxy, everything is great! This bottle really is
very important! You're great!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Ты поможешь мне: Will you help me get it?
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Конечно! Рокси: Certainly! Roxy and Eirik looking for clues! Yay!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Стой! Ты умеешь: Stop! Do you know how to unlock a deadbolt?
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_*тихо* Ну конеч:
*quietly*
Well, of course he knows how to unlock the bolt, he's got 
hands! And now you can do it, to! \fiRoxy, stop being so weird!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_В общем там две:
You know, there is a door and... I wanted to say - let's go there.
There's a shortcut.
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Привет! Ты Эйри: Hello! You're Eirik, right? You look extravagant!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Может это стран:
Maybe this is a strange question, but... Tell me, are you 
attractive? I mean, for other humans, girls mostly. 
Do they think you have the sex appeal?
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Плохо. Я на теб: That's bad. I'm not particularly like you.
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Почему тебе нуж: Why do you need to be like a human?
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Есть одна девуш:
There's this girl, and she... I think it might be that she's into guys
that look more like humans.
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Вот как? И что,: Is that so? And what, is it serious between you two?
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_О да! Супер-сер:
Oh yeah! Super serious! She seriously turns me on!
She is so different from everything that surrounds me here!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_*шепчет тебе* О:
*whispering to you*
He hangs around Tina's house all the time.
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Ох, Святые корн: Oh, Holy Roots, I didn't notice you... wow!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Чего это он так: Why is he staring at me, Eirik?
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Кажется, ты тож:
Looks like you are also different from everything that surrounds 
him!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Нет-нет! Я не к: No, no! I'm not some kind of pervert, I...
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Не хотите зайти:
Would you like to come visit? My house is to the north from the 
leader's house. Just a step away from his house to the cliff and...
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Да. Хорошо. Поп: Yes. Fine. We'll try to find time. Thanks for the invitation!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_*шепчет тебе* О:
*whispering to you*
He's still  \fistaring\fr at me...
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Ладно. Мы пойде: Okay, We'll take our leave now.
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Хорошо. Обязате: Fine. Be sure to come visit!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Получается, мес: It turns out that the locals just dump all the garbage here?
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Ага. Кожура от:
Yeah. Vegetable peels, leaky rags, all that. Here it will rot
and then return to the soil.
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Да чего такого-:
What's so bad?.. Although, yes, probably it's an \fi "ugh!".\fr
It's just... it's good that it's rotting. Otherwise the whole island
would be littered.
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Да, мир, в кото:
Yes, a world where garbage does not decompose would be 
terrible!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Ладно. Теперь н: Okay. Now we need to get the flask.
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_*наигранно* \"О:
*theatrically*
"Ugh! Ew, garbage, gross, Roxy won't go in there!"
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Но ты же сама т: Didn't you just say that there’s nothing wrong with that!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Не-а! Если тебе:
Nope! If it's "ugh" to you, then it's "ugh" to me, too! Or do you
wanna say that if I am a mouse, then I should dig through the 
garbage? Are you too clean for this?
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Вот там! Где-то: Over there! Somewhere in that pile.
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Ох, да что ты т: Oh, what's the messing around there!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Да, точно. Я да: Yes, exactly. I even know which slot it went into.
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Я слишком больш: I'm too big! Okay, one second.
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_(Наверное, она: (She probably turned into a mouse and dove \fithere\fr...)
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Славно! Давай,: Nice! Let's get out of here!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_*наигранно* \"Н:
*theatrically*
"Finally, we got out of there, right? It stinks, ugh!"
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Да, я понял, чт: Yes, I get it, you're saying that I am an obnoxious neatnik! Fine!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Ага, вижу. Чист: Yeah, I see. Neatnik with a peel on her head!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Все хорошо! Я в: It's fine! I'll be back! I will find you! Everything is great!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Исчезла... Болв:
Disappeared... You idiot, why did you blurt that out!
She just wanted to fit in!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Сначала я долже: I've got to find all the clues first.
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Может, хватит с: Maybe you'd rather quit mooning over this bald-pate gal, huh?
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Я чуть-чуть поз: I borrowed a little bit of your potion, and look... TA-DAAA!!!
Мастер фраза для определения максимально: Well, that old thing almost tore me to pieces for its gold! gold! gol
dialogs_swamp_camp_О боже, они все косят: Gosh, they all are staring at me!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ну конечно косятся, в:
Of course they are, you're a human, after all! 
Must've figured out the way things are by now!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Почему на площади так:
Why there's so many people on the square?
Are they celebrating me or something?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Что? Нет! Сегодня у о:
What? No! Today one of the locals is having her rite of passage. 
And you're somewhat of an honored guest.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Как я понимаю, вождь: I believe the Leader found it... symbolic.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Очень важный день! Ля:
A very important day! The frog is recognized as an adult and 
accepted into tribe.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Это и так серьезный р:
This is already a serious ritual, but knowing the girl that's 
initiating today... In short, today is a special day.
dialogs_swamp_camp_В кои-то веки рад, чт: For once I'm glad I'm not the center of attention!
dialogs_swamp_camp_О, Эйрик, поверь, ты:
Oh, Eirik, trust me, you are! The fact that you are not surrounded
by a crowd of onlookers is a miracle of frog restraint.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ладно, пообщайся пока: Okay, you go talk to the people now.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Тебе нужно чуть-чуть:
You need to chat a little with the locals. Hang out, start some 
conversation, be friendly.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Короче, это снизит гр:
In short, this will reduce the tension. Relax, everything will 
be fine!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ладно, мне правда пор: Okay, I really have to go. Good luck!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Вы спасли моего сына!: You saved my son! Thank you, thank you!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Спасибо вам большое!: Thank you so much! You are our savior!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Спасибо! Спасибо! Спа: Thank you, thank you, thank you!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ну конечно! Сами зара:
Well, of course! You brought it on us, you solved it yourself!
Well done! Now let me pat you on the head, wontcha!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Да вы ж и заразили, л: You people brought it here! Ugh, nothing good from you!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Чуешь? Человеком воня: Can you smell it? It stinks of hu-man!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Откуда ты зна-аешь мо: How do you know my na-ame, freak? We never met!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Мэригольд тебе про ме:
Has Merigold told you about me? She told you to beware me,
right?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Правильно! Ты стоишь:
Right! You're standing here alive just because our Leader 
said so! If it was up to me, I would drive a spear into your skull!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Так что знай, все, чт: Just know that everything she said about me is true!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Прям все правда? Она: Is it all true? She told me quite a few things...
dialogs_swamp_camp_Говорила, что ты само: She said you are a narcissistic idiot.
dialogs_swamp_camp_А еще рассказывала, ч:
She also told me that one night you confused a jug of water 
with a chamber pot... and drank it all! All true?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ой, а еще она говорил: Oh, and she also told me that you and your mother...
dialogs_swamp_camp_Он нарывается, Габл!: He's asking for it, Gubble! He's asking for it!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Хм... мне не о чем с: Hmm... I have no-thing to talk to you about, freak.
dialogs_swamp_camp_*Громко* Лучше я обра:
*Loud*
I'd rather turn to my people!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Только посмотрите, до:
Just look at us! We kneel before people!
We allow them into our sacred places!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Вот он - кто он? Один:
Here he is - who is he? One of us? No! He's a reminder of how
we became weak in spirit.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Вместо того, чтобы вв:
Instead of entrusting our lives to the Tree, we hide behind
human tricks. This is what we have become?!
dialogs_swamp_camp_А зачем мы здесь сего:
Why are we here today? The Leader says that today Tina 
becomes one of us!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Она, представьте! Одн: Imagine! Her! One of us! This is who we are now?!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Мы подпустили людей к: We allowed people near our springs. How will this end?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Сегодня племя принима:
Today the tribe welcomes a new frog. On such a day the Leader
makes a speech. Are you the Leader?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Точно! Не ты ли говор: Exactly! Aren't you the one to talk about traditions?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ага. Так прояви-ка ув: Yeah. So show them some respect.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Поверить не могу, что: I can't believe this is happening today!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Почему же? Ты выросла:
Why? You grew up here! Sooner or later the tribe was to accept 
you!
dialogs_swamp_camp_(Еще один человек?! Я: (Another human?! I thought I was the only one allowed here!)
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ой, в смысле, здравст:
I mean, hello, Eirik! I wanted to say a big thank you for what you 
did!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Милая сначала надо по: Honey, you need to say hello first!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Простите, моя дочь вп: I apologize, this is the first time my daughter sees a human.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ох, конечно! Меня зов:
Oh, of course! My name is Tina, this is my father, Frob,
and this is my sister, Claire.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Впервые видит человек: First time she sees a human? It's just... Are you her father?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Не родной, конечно! Я:
Not by blood, of course! I found Tina near the swamps
when she was this tiny.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ох... Я понял. Сочувс: Oh... I get it. My condolences, I also became an orphan early.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Да, но... я не сирота: Thanks, but... I'm not an orphan. I have a father!
Yes, sure! Sorry. I just wanted to say that I didn't think
I'd meet anyone of our kind here.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Я отойду поздороватьс: Shall I go say hello to my friends, father?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Нет, все нормально! П:
No, it's fine! It's just I was just bullied all my childhood
because I'm... well, not really a frog.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Но я всю жизнь живу з:
But I'm living here all my life and I think I'm among my own here, 
so... Even if some people don't like me that much...
dialogs_swamp_camp_Я правда хотела сказа:
I really wanted to say thank you! I heard you helped a lot with 
the cure!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Это было ужасно! Я пр:
It was terrible! I look after the kids, they're like family to me...
It’s scary to even think what would've happened if Fagop hadn’t
found a way to get them back on their feet.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ну и вы с Мэри, конеч: Well, with you and Mary, of course!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ага. Честно говоря, я:
Yeah. To be honest, at first I thought that the crowd had 
gathered because of me. You know, the children and the cure!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Да, у меня сегодня ин: Yes, it's my rite of passage day.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Так Мэригольд о тебе:
So Merigold was talking about you? You are the girl that
will be accepted into the tribe today?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Наверное, это очень в: This must be a \fivery\fr important day for you!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Не то слово! Это долж:
You bet! This should have happened several years ago.
I'm not a child anymore!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Совет все тянул и тян:
The council kept stalling... They say the Leader himself insisted 
that this finally happens today.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Не знаю, но я так рад:
I don't know, but I'm so glad! I was afraid that this day would 
never come.
dialogs_swamp_camp_А у тебя уже была ини: Have you already had your rite of passage?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Да. Она была на мое с: Yes. It was when I came of age, like all frogs.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Не у всех, Клэр. Твоя:
Not all, Claire. Your sister is also one of us, but the council
allowed her rite just now.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Верно отец. Сегодня в: Right, father. Today everything will come together.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Это старый обряд. Я м: This is an old ritual. I can explain it to you if you want.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Прямо сейчас вождь на:
Right now the Leader is drawing water from the Sacred Spring
into a bowl to take a sip from it.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Теперь он передает ча:
Now he passes the cup on to other prominent members of the 
tribe.
dialogs_swamp_camp_А ваша дочь, вторая,:
And your second daughter, Claire, is she also a prominent 
member of the tribe?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Нет, но она сестра Ти:
No, but she's Tina's sister. It is customary for one of the relatives
to stand in the circle.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Я был там, когда была:
I was there when Claire was initiated. Now it's her turn to accept
sister into the tribe.
dialogs_swamp_camp_После чаша возвращает:
After that the cup is returned to the Leader. He will give 
a speech and finally let Tina take a sip from the common cup.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Круг замкнется, и Тин: They go full circle, and then Tina will finally become one of us.
dialogs_swamp_camp_(Черт! И где Мэриголь: (Damn! And where is Merigold? She left me alone again!)
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ох, Эйрик, здравствуй: Oh, Eirik, hello... again. It's about to start. Claire, meet Eirik.
dialogs_swamp_camp_У нее сегодня тоже ин: Is she having her rite of passage today too?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Нет. Она уже прошла е: No. She's already passed it. Even though she's younger.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Она была на мое совер: It was when I came of age, like all frogs.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Твоя сестра тоже одна:
Your sister is also one of us, but the council only allowed her
rite of passage just now. So no, not everyone.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Верно отец. Сегодняшн: Right, father. Today everything will come together.
dialogs_swamp_camp_О твоем посвящении, с: About your rite of passage, sister.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ох. Ну конечно! Глупы: Oh. Well, of course! Silly question...
dialogs_swamp_camp_Начинается! Давай, ми: It's starting! Come on, honey! Good luck!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Вождь набирает воду и:
The Leader is drawing water from the Sacred Spring to sip from
it.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Клэр тоже видный член: Is Claire also a prominent member of the tribe?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Нет, но она родня Тин:
No, but she's Tina's family member. One of the relatives
must stand in the circle.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Я стоял там когда в п: I stood there when she was accepted into the tribe.
