dialogs_swamp_camp_После чаша возвращает:
Afterwards the cup is returned to the Leader. He will give a 
speech and finally give Tina a drink from the common cup.
It comes full circle and then...
dialogs_swamp_camp_(Это вся речь? Хм, ём: (Is that the whole speech? Hmm, that's deep!)
dialogs_swamp_camp_Некоторые из вас, я з:
Some of you, I know, have spoken against today's rite of 
passage.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Кто-то говорит, будто:
Some of you say that by accepting Tina we betray our legacy,
That we are losing our roots.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Напротив, скажу я. Се: I will say it's the opposite. Today we pay tribute to our traditions.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Все мы дети Священног: We are all children of the Sacred Tree.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Все, кто говорит и ст:
Everyone who speaks and walks on this earth.
We are all children of the Sacred tree.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Так говорили вам ваши:
That's what your mothers told you. And so did their mothers 
to them.
dialogs_swamp_camp_В своих суждениях не: Never forget about this in your judgments.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Сегодня двое достойны: Today, two deserve to stand in a circle.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Тину все знают. Для м:
Everyone knows Tina. For many of us, she has long been our 
kind.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Но принес с собой сам:
But he brought with him the best news in many years.
His selfless help, the cure that he brought to us...
dialogs_swamp_camp_... спасло множество:
...has saved many lives. The tribe is honored to have such a 
fellowship. The tribe will call them "brothers."
dialogs_swamp_camp_Но вождь сегодня же д: But Leader, today is Tina’s day!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Эйрик, тебе оказана б: Eirik, we grant a great honor to you.
dialogs_swamp_camp_(Ладно, Эйрик, отказы:
(Okay, Eirik, it’s \fiimpolite\fr to refuse... 
And that’s putting it mildly!)
dialogs_swamp_camp_Я... нет-нет... Да, я: I... no, no... Yes, I... Oh!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ты берешь чашу и дела: You take the cup and take two large sips.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Прошло много веков с:
Many centuries have passed since human was last allowed to 
our shrines, and now...
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ну вот. Стоило мне от:
Right. As soon as I left for a bit, you got into trouble again, 
Eirik!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Чего? Зачем ты бьешь: What? Why are you hitting my chest!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Мэри! Ох... Что за га: Mary! Oh... What nasty stuff did you feed me?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Безоар, это был безоа: Bezoar, it was bezoar. Oh, thank the roots, you're alive!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Отравили? Чушь!!! Это: Poisoned? Nonsense!!! It was an omen!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Что случится, если мы: What happens if we let people near our springs?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Нет! Само Священное д:
No! The Sacred Tree itself will curse the blasphemers!
And that's what happened!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Он задумал отпить из:
He dared to drink from our spring and this is what happened!
He choked on our water!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Хватит дурить людей!:
Stop fooling everyone! You did it, Gubble! Do you think
you will get away with it?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Да как ты смеешь, пре: How dare you, traitor! I'll send you to your ancestors right now!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Серьезно? Просто прит: Seriously? You'll just pretend that nothing happened?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Замолчи, Мэригольд! Я: Be quiet, Merigold! I will not tolerate empty accusations.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Если кому-то есть что:
If anyone has something to say, they should think twice
before opening their mouth.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Этим и займитесь. Под: Do exactly that. Think about what you will say at the trial.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Это значит, что нам н:
This means we need to prove that Gubble put poison in your 
cup.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Да?.. Боже, зачем я с: Really?.. God, why did I even come here!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Как будто выпил две б: It's like spending the night in a ditch after two bottles of rum...
Good. I mean... it could have been worse!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Когда я подошла, мест:
When I came here, some guys were having a theological
dispute over you. If it wasn't for me... 
All in all, it's good that I came.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ну, они и впрямь реши:
Well, they did conclude that this was a bad omen. Will of 
the Tree. Many of them still think so!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Правда, когда спрашив:
Although, when you ask them why then a simple antidote
changed its will, they have no words.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ага. Габл, наверняка:
Yeah. Gubble is probably preparing an accusatory speech right 
now to turn the crowd against you.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Он собирается восполь:
He's going to take full advantage of the situation...
Poisoning you is extremely clever for such an idiot!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Неважно! Когда мы док:
It doesn't matter! It will all end as soon as we prove that it was 
poison and not the “will of the Tree”, and call out the culprit.
dialogs_swamp_camp_У меня кстати вопрос,: By the way, I have a question. If this is poison...
dialogs_swamp_camp_\"Если\"? Что значит: "If"? What does "if" mean? Do you take it on faith too?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Нет! Просто почему др:
No! Just why didn't others get poisoned? 
They all drank from the cup.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Нет-нет, что ты! Вода:
No, no, what are you talking about! Water has special properties,
no one drank it except you!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Те, кто в круге, лишь: Those in the circle only put their lips to the cup.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ты все разлил, когда: You spilled it when you passed out...
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ну что-то же должно б: Did I spill all of it?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Даже если так, я уже: Even if you didn't, I wouldn’t be able to prove anything.
dialogs_swamp_camp_А возможно, что отрав: Maybe it's the source itself that was poisoned?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Нет. Источник нельзя:
No. The source cannot be poisoned. It is sacred and eternally 
pure.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Что? Мне казалось ты: What? I thought you weren't religious!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Эйрик, есть религия,:
Eirik, there is religion, and there are facts. The Sacred Spring
cannot be poisoned... It is sacred and eternally pure.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Хм, хорошо... Итак, ч:
Hmm, okay... So, the cup was empty. Then they filled it with 
water. I was there. And then they passed it around...
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ха, верно! \"Круг под: Ha, that's right! The "Circle of Suspects"!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Мы точно знаем, что е:
We know for sure that if the cup was poisoned, it must be 
someone who stood in the circle during the ceremony!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Кто-то? Святые корни,:
Someone? Holy roots, Eirik, it was Gubble, who else could it 
be!..
dialogs_swamp_camp_О, нет! Нет-нет-нет!: Oh no! No no no! These are all questions!..
dialogs_swamp_camp_Нет! Только не говори: No! Don't tell me you like detective novels!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Не-а! Я не люблю книг: Nope! I don't like books! Generally. Well...
dialogs_swamp_camp_Может, прочитал пароч: Maybe I read a couple of detective stories, yes!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Эйрик, не превращай э: Don't turn this into a detective story, Eirik!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Дело раскрыто! Это Га:
Case solved! It's Gubble! All that's left to do is figure out
how to pin him down, and it's done!
dialogs_swamp_camp_С чего предлагаешь на: Where do you want to start?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Кто именно стоял в кр: Who was standing in the circle? Who held the cup?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Местный вождь Крейг,:
Local Leader Craig, Auntie Hylidae, Croak, Fagop and Claire. 
Well, and Gubble, of course.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Если подумать, вождь:
Come to think of it, the Leader could also have put the poison.
He started it, pulled me out of the crowd... In the end, it was he
who gave me the damn cup!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ну а зачем? Зачем он:
Then why? Why would he do that? 
Why would he accept me into his tribe?
dialogs_swamp_camp_На сколько я понял, с:
As far as I know, he was stalling it with that Tina girl.
And then suddenly - me! What nonsense!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Туман слабеет, ты том:
The fog is weakening, you are the evidence of that. All the
leaders are scared that the sea can only bring new enemies to 
the tribes.
dialogs_swamp_camp_И тут выясняется что: And then it turns out that you are... friendly.
dialogs_swamp_camp_И ты человек! Ты, к п:
And you are a human! For example, you can enter the
human outpost basement without making a fuss, which you did.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Перетянуть тебя на св: Getting you on this side would be great, wouldn't it?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Вот черт, это же... И: Damn it, they... They want to make me a spy?!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ты ничего никому не д:
You don't owe anything to anyone, and you never promised 
anything. Relax.
dialogs_swamp_camp_А что ты хотел от при:
What did you expect from the tribal Leader invitation? You 
expected to see a politician with no hidden motives?
dialogs_swamp_camp_В любом случае точно:
In any case, we can say for sure that it was not Craig who 
poisoned you.
dialogs_swamp_camp_В этом смысле ты для: In this sense, you are a valuable asset to him. He bet on you.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Я понимаю, что тебе в:
I understand that you have fun playing detective, but if you...
If you ever mention that you suspect her, you're done.
dialogs_swamp_camp_А что? Она здесь что-: What? Is she some kind of shadow governer here?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Нет. Она просто старе: No. She is simply the oldest woman of the tribe.
dialogs_swamp_camp_И? Большая часть мест:
So? Most of the locals were tadpoles when they had already
known her as “auntie”.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Древние предания здес: Ancient legends here are known mainly from her retelling.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Да и она скорее всего:
And she most likely won’t even talk to you.
The older the frog, the less talkative it is.
dialogs_swamp_camp_С другой стороны, тем:
On the other hand, the more her words are worth.
This has its own benefit, but...
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ты не вытянешь из нее: You won't get a word out of her.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Кроук? Это тот вояка?:
Croak? The warrior? It seems to me that he commanded the 
squad I ran into with Ulfa?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Когда ты пролезал сюд: You mean the last time you sneaked in here? Yes, that's him.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Мы с Ульфой крепко от:
Ulfa and I gave them some hard time. Perhaps he held 
a grudge.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Даже если бы так, он:
Even so, he would rather challenge you to a fight.
The old warrior would not use poison.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Он тоже большая шишка: Is he a big shot too? Since he was in the circle?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Он предводитель воино: He is the head of the warriors.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Предводитель воинов?:
Head of the warriors?
I thought warriors go under the Leader of the village personally.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Так и есть, это не оф:
That's right, it's not an official title.
Formally, Croak is just one of the warriors.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Но его уважают. Так т: But he is respected. That's the way it is here - they listen to him.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Правда те, кто помоло: Although, the youngsters listen to Gubble more.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Габл претендует на ег: Gubble's gunning for his place? Were they rivals?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Нет, они из разных по:
No, they are different generations and almost never see each 
other.
dialogs_swamp_camp_А что ты можешь расск: What can you tell me about Fagop?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ты его знаешь. Это ме:
You know him already. He's a local doctor and... Eirik, he is my 
old friend! Whatever game you play, he is clear from suspicion!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Вот именно! Он лекарь:
That's it! He's a doctor! If poison was used, then you need to 
check if he's related to it somehow? 
I mean, who knows more about poisons!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Не неси чепуху! Ты же:
Don't talk nonsense! You don't think he was the poisoner, do 
you?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Послушай, реальная жи:
Listen, real life is not a detective novel. If there is someone
you least suspect, then they are most likely truly innocent!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Поговорим о Клэр. Ты: Let's talk about Claire. Do you know her?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Она вообще оказалась:
She actually ended up in this story by accident.
She is not a politician, not a warrior.
dialogs_swamp_camp_В круге она стояла то:
She stood in the circle only because her sister was
having her rite of passage.
dialogs_swamp_camp_И вообще, у тебя буде: And, you will have more chances to meet her.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Я слышала, ее отец го:
I heard her father say that you can spend the night
at their place for now.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ты подозреваешь Габла: Do you suspect Gubble? Are you sure it's him?
dialogs_swamp_camp_А кто еще? Конечно, э:
Of course it's him! Who else? He put on such a performance!
If we don't expose him, the Leader will no longer be able to shut 
his mouth!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Может он вообще затея:
Maybe he even started a coup?! Then there's no way for you to 
stay...
dialogs_swamp_camp_Серьезно? Он мне каза:
Seriously? He seemed like a talkative idiot to me,
not an ambitious politician.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Мне тоже! Но внешност: Me too! But it turns out looks can be deceiving...
dialogs_swamp_camp_То, что произошло во:
What happened during the ritual had a great effect on the 
locals.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Все, что нужно сделат:
All Gubble has to do is deliver a couple more monologues 
about sacred springs, and why they shouldn’t allow people 
near them.
dialogs_swamp_camp_А потом достаточно по:
And then to point his finger at the Leader, who insisted on both 
Tina’s passage and your presence!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Звучит как начало бол: Sounds like a start of a big fight!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ага. Очень хитро. Мож: Yeah. Very clever. Maybe someone told him?..
dialogs_swamp_camp_Хм... На другой сторо:
Hmm... On the other side of the settlement, in the east,
there is a passage to the caves. Locals collect bog ore there.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Я слышала Габл часто: I heard Gubble goes there pretty often.
Well... not really. He's a guard, maybe he's just making his 
rounds.
dialogs_swamp_camp_То есть мы просто тык: So we're only taking our guesses here?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Да. Но если тебе нужн:
Yes. But if you need a secluded place to do shady things,
these caves are just the right place.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ясно. Проверить пещер: Clear. Check the caves and find out what Gubble does there.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Только будь осторожен: Just be careful. Monsters live deep in the caves.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Да-да, я просто... Бе: Yeah, yeah, I just... Take care.
dialogs_swamp_camp_В этой сумке нескольк:
There are several bottles in this bag. Potions of transformation.
You won't need to run to me every time.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ха... Ты воровала у м: Ha... You stole sperm from me at night, am I right?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Что! Нет! Мне хватило: What! No! I had enough old samples to make a spare.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Да не воровала я твою:
I didn't steal your semen! That's it, I shouldn't have done it!
Give it back!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Что! Нет! Я пошутил!: What! No! I was joking! Leave it!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ох, так тебе все-таки:
Oh, so you do need these potions, you half-baked joker!
Get out of here before I change my mind!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ты получил сумку с до: You received a bag with plenty of transformation potions.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Эм... а ты милый мале: Um... and you're a cute little frog. Are you lost?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Э-э... Так вроде ты с: Uh... Weren't you the one to start talking to me?
dialogs_swamp_camp_*передразнивает* \"Ээ: *mocks* “Uh, um...”, are you stupid or something?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Слышь, малец, я тебе: Listen, kid, I kinda saved your life!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Не-а. Мне твое лекарс: Nope. I don't need your cure. The disease killed only brats.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Я слышал, что почти в: I heard that almost all the children got sick.
That's what I'm saying. Brats. But I didn't get infected.
The Sacred Tree chose me.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Считаешь себя лучше д:
You think you're better than others because you haven’t been 
sick?
dialogs_swamp_camp_(Теперь ясно, почему:
(Now it’s clear why he plays here alone. And he probably was 
never infected because he doesn’t talk to anyone.)
dialogs_swamp_camp_Да ниче. Я пойду, пож: Nothing. I'll go then, I guess.
dialogs_swamp_camp_(Да что нового мне мо: (What news can this racket tell me!)
dialogs_swamp_camp_Древо и тебя проклянё: Will the Tree curse you if you drink from the cup?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Нет! Древо хранит нас: No! The Tree protects us all, it wouldn't curse us!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Помните я рассказывал:
Remember I told you a story about a little frog who was afraid 
all the time?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Да, но... Пообещай чт: Yes, but... Promise that you won't drink from the cup!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Хм... Я подумаю, ладн: Hmm... I'll think about it, okay?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Все, бегите, вас ждет: Now run, everyone, your mother is waiting for you.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Привет, Эйрик! Я очен: Hello Eirik! I'm so glad you're alright!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Меня так легко не сва:
Bringing me down is not that easy! Was your rite of passage 
delayed?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Да... в свете обстоят:
Yes...some circumstances. Now everyone is thinking something 
else.
dialogs_swamp_camp_А ты уверен что ее от: Are you sure it was poisoned? They just say different things...
dialogs_swamp_camp_А что? Думаешь это ка:
Why? You think it's a curse from the Sacred Tree? It's all 
nonsense!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Почему ты так уверен?: Why are you so sure? Don't you believe in the Sacred Tree?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Нет, вполне себе верю:
I'd say I believe it a lot, yeah. Magic fog, miracle springs,
girls with tails...
dialogs_swamp_camp_Просто я верю Мэри, а: I just trust Mary in this, and she says it’s nonsense!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ох! Я наверное звучу: Oh! I probably sound like an idiot without my own opinion!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Да нет! Это мудро. В:
No, but really! That's wise. In a way. I think.
At least that's what Auntie Hylidae would say!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Не знаю... А вдруг эт:
I don’t know... What if it’s true? What if it happened because
you are... unworthy?
dialogs_swamp_camp_В смысле и я! Мы оба!:
I mean, me too! Both of us! Because you and I... are humans.
And if I drank, too, the wrath of the Tree would fall on me too!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Нет это был яд. Кто-т:
No, it was poison. Someone has poisoned the cup.
I think tomorrow evening everything will become clear.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Собираешься найти его: Are you going to find him?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Да, только сначала бы: Yes, but first I would like to find a place to stay for the night.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Можешь спать у нас. Я: You can sleep at our place. I think my father won't mind.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Наш дом на возвышенно:
Our house is on a hill, it is drier than other houses.
And we have a lot of space.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Глупости! Ты помог на:
Don't say that! You helped our tribe. You would be welcome at 
any house, and I'm glad you chose ours.
dialogs_swamp_camp_В любом доме? После в: At any house? After Gubble's speeches, I strongly doubt it.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Габл молод и слишком:
Gubble is too young, too hot-tempered. Dedicated fanatic, you 
know.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Да, он искренне верит: Yes, he sincerely believes in what he says.
Tina, sit down at the table.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ну, рассказывай! Гово: Now, tell me! They say you're not from the island.
dialogs_swamp_camp_И ты просто прошел ск: And you just passed through the fog?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ох, этот волшебный ту:
Oh, this magical fog, well... In the end, our ship crashed, but 
yes. That's how I found myself here.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Значит это правда. Ту: So it's true. The fog is weakening...
dialogs_swamp_camp_Храни нас Священное Д: May the Sacred Tree protect us!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Разве это так ужасно?:
Is it really that terrible? It's impossible to get through to you
because of the damn fog!
dialogs_swamp_camp_То есть да, вы пережи: That is, you are worried, but sometimes change is for the better!
dialogs_swamp_camp_У вас тут небольшой,:
You have a small isolated island here, you seem to be coping,
but access to the sea...
dialogs_swamp_camp_Представьте - большие:
Imagine big beautiful frigates with holds filled
with exotic goods, noisy ports!..
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ох, вы, наверное и не: Oh, you probably don't even get what I'm talking about.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Да нет. Много человеч: Not really. Lots of human stuff. All clear.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ты путешествовал по в:
You traveled on water. This is probably what your life is.
Do you miss it?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Обычно я и правда не:
Usually I didn’t really stay long on the shore.
But there's so much going on here. That's plenty of adventures 
for now!
dialogs_swamp_camp_А мы вот не любим при: But we don't like adventures here.
No. We aren't many. We don't have the forces for another war.
What does war have to do with it?..
dialogs_swamp_camp_Большие красивые фрег: Big beautiful frigates with holds that can be filled with weapons.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Да, отец. Целой кучей: Yes, father. A whole bunch of human weapons.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ну хватит! Не все же: Come on! Not all people are bad!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Конечно, нет, Тина! Я: Of course not, Tina! I'm just... You're right. I'm too biased!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Вот взять хотя бы Эйр:
Take Eirik for example! He's not like that at all! He's from
another world with no centuries of wars between furries and 
humans!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Скажи, Эйрик. Ты живе:
Tell me, Eirik. You now live side by side with the islanders.
Local people probably seem too...
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ну... в конце концов,:
Well... after all, there have been centuries of war here. 
Pointless murders, xenophobia, predatory raids.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Но люди за туманом жи:
But the people behind the fog lived without all this, right?
Surely they are very different from the locals!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Им не с кем было воев:
They had no one to fight and no one to hate!
Maybe they even forgot what it was like!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ну, кхм-кхм... Я бы н: Well, ahem... I wouldn't say that...
dialogs_swamp_camp_... что живу бок о бо:
... that I live side by side with the locals. The house I now live 
in stands on the border of the Dark Forest. 
There are no humans there.
dialogs_swamp_camp_М! Вот как! Дом на гр: Mhm! That's how it is! House on the border... symbolic!
dialogs_swamp_camp_А правду говорят, что:
Is it true what they say that you somehow managed to
make friends with the Wolf Clan?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Дескать, когда ты под:
Say, when you raised your weapon against our warriors, one 
she-wolf came out to stand by your side.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ох, нет! Она не из кл:
Oh no! She's not from the clan! Her name is Ulfa, she is on her 
own.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Так и знала, что слух: I knew it was a rumor.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Спасибо, отец, за это: Thank you for the dinner, father.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Когда захочешь спать,: When you are off to sleep, ask Tina. She'll show you the room.
dialogs_swamp_camp_В поселении? Ну, в ос: In the settlement? Well, mostly I care for the neighbors' children.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Вот как? Ты вроде как: Is that so? Are you some kind of local kindergartener?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Воспитательница? Ха,:
Kindergartener? Haha, I don't even know! No, I think I'm just 
helping Auntie Hylidae.
dialogs_swamp_camp_В детстве я часто кру:
As a child, I often revolved around her, listened to all our legends,
and now I’m retelling them!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Мне нравятся старинны:
I like old tales. I know most of them by heart since childhood.
Well, I also like to babysit children!
dialogs_swamp_camp_А ты нравишься им! Сл:
And they like you! I heard how worried they were about you.
Those children in the square.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Честно говоря, не зна:
To be honest, I don’t know what to say to them. I know they're 
afraid but I can't just avoid the rite of passage!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Я так ждала этого. Бе:
I was so looking forward to it. Without this ritual, the place 
where I've spent all my life feels like it’s not mine.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Как думаешь, в поселе:
Do you think there's anyone in the settlement who'd be against
you being accepted into the tribe? Those who wish you harm, 
perhaps?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Много кто высказывалс:
Many spoke out against it, but I always accepted it as... 
I don't know, just some noise? 
I thought there would always be squabbles, you know?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Я просто отстранялась:
I just looked away from it. Even now it’s hard for me to believe 
that someone set this up on purpose.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Как будто, чтобы сдел:
As if you had to personally hate someone to do something like 
that. For real, you know?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Я не знаю, есть ли у: I'm not sure if I have such enemies.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Поэтому я боюсь, что:
That's why I'm afraid that no one set anything up.
Which will be worse, because that would mean...
dialogs_swamp_camp_...что я просто недос: ...that I am simply unworthy to drink from the Sacred Source.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Что я чужая здесь и с:
That I am a stranger here and the fairy tales that I tell local
children do not actually belong to me.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Скажи, ты ведь пересе: Tell me, you crossed the Fog on your ship. What was it like?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Есть столько преданий:
There are so many legends about the Fog. I often tell them
to children and I can't help but ask. You are the first one to 
return.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Я не знаю. То есть, я: I don't know. I mean, I don't remember. I think I almost died.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Когда я проснулся, во:
When I woke up, I couldn’t understand where I was at all.
All the memories of the previous few months were jumbled.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Как страшный сон, пон: Like a bad dream, you know?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Да, понимаю. В предан:
Yes, I understand. Legends say that the Fog is a labyrinth for 
souls. That the Tree surrounded the island with the Fog to 
protect us from people.
dialogs_swamp_camp_И что заклятье не веч: And that the spell does not last forever.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Все сильно перепугали:
Everyone was very scared when they learned that someone
had crossed the fog barrier. You are the harbinger of great 
change.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Тетушка Квакша сказал:
Auntie Hylidae said that the Leader invited you to see for 
himself what the new era will bring us.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Потому что за Туманом:
Because behind the Fog there are evil humans, with their 
ships stacked with weapons?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ну... Так думают. Все:
Well... That's what they think. Everyone is tense, yes. Auntie 
says that the Leader is wise since he has invited you as our 
guest.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Не знаю, но она так г:
I don't know, but that's what she says. Anyway, I just want to 
say that all this is very unusual. Everything is out of place now.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ох, я, пожалуй, спать: Oh, I think I'll go to bed.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Хорошо. А можно еще о: Okay. Can I ask one more question?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Из-за той волчицы ход:
Because of that she-wolf, there are rumors that you were even
accepted in the Wolf Clan.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ты сказал что она не: You said she's not from the clan. So where is she from?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ниоткуда. В смысле, о: Nowhere. I mean, she was a dormant one.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ох, я должен объяснит:
Oh, I have to explain! Merigold invented the potion.
I have it here in my bag.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Что это значит? То ес:
What does it mean? You mean... You and Merigold tore
the she-wolf out of her wild form?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Да, вроде того! И не:
Yes, something like that! And not only her, there is also Hannah!
And I hope to find someone else soon.
dialogs_swamp_camp_У меня теперь вроде к:
Now I kind of have a house, even a garden... Damn, a whole 
farm! That's not what I would expect from myself!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Подожди! Но ведь счит:
Wait! But it is believed that those who are dormant choose
this path themselves.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Для фурри решение уйт:
For furries, the decision to go into the woods and abandon 
civilization is a personal choice!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Может их родители что:
Maybe their parents made some decisions. But the ones I 
know, they were just born animals and didn’t know what to do 
with it.
dialogs_swamp_camp_При этом чувствовали,:
At the same time, they felt that they were different. More like a 
curse, you know?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ох, все и правда свер: Oh, it really is all out of place!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Кажется, да. Я думаю,: I think I do. I think I understand what you mean. Although...
dialogs_swamp_camp_Кто-то вроде Габла ск:
Someone like Gubble would say that the potion's an 
abomination.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Что это противоестест:
That this is unnatural, that all these are “human things”
that go against some centuries-old tradition.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Не знаю... Ты ведь не:
I don’t know... You don’t wish them harm, right?
They might not follow you?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Можно сказать, ты воз:
You could say you're giving them choice back. If you look at it
that way, then that’s the definition of tradition, right?
dialogs_swamp_camp_В выборе. Мы не остан:
The choice. We do not stop those who want to abandon the 
language and live a wild life. 
Why should they stop those who want to go back?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Да! Я думаю то, что в:
Yes! I think what you and Merigold do is good. This is strange,
but if you think about it, it is not against our traditions.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Думаю, тетушка Квакша:
I think Auntie Hylidae would say that you need to look at the 
roots, not at the crowns.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ладно. Я не буду боль: Okay. I won't bother you anymore. Good night, Eirik.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Стоит все же поговори: I should talk to Merigold before going to bed.
dialogs_swamp_camp_(Ты слышала Рокси? Зе:
(Did you hear that, Roxy? The potion he was talking about, it 
can change everything! And he has a whole bag of it there!)
dialogs_swamp_camp_(У него огромный дом,:
(He has a huge house where he keeps the ones like you
or something! This is your chance, ha!)
dialogs_swamp_camp_(Это зелье должно быт: (This potion must be around here somewhere!)
dialogs_swamp_camp_(И какая из этих скля: (Which bottle? They are all sealed! Should I wake him up?)
dialogs_swamp_camp_*сквозь сон* \"О, мис:
*dreaming* “Oh, miss, you are so charming!.. Let me just... 
mmm...”
dialogs_swamp_camp_*засыпает* Надо будет:
*falls asleep*
I gotta tell them that they have mice here... tomorrow...
dialogs_swamp_camp_(Она копается в моих: (She's scrounging through my stuff?.. The hell with it, I'm off!)
dialogs_swamp_camp_(Ну же, давай Рокси,: (Come on Roxy, that dumbhead won't help you!)
dialogs_swamp_camp_(Ух, пробка застряла!:
(Ugh, the plug is stuck! Mmm... I need to pull a little more.
Come on, come on!)
(A-a-and... Voila! Hmm... it tastes weird. Did I get caught?! 
A-a-ah, someone lifts me up, huh!!!)
dialogs_swamp_camp_(Высоко! Высоко... ме:
(So high! I was NEVER taken this high up... it's my own 
height!)
dialogs_swamp_camp_Я знала, знала, знала: I knew, I knew, I knew it! How awesome is this! Roxy speaking!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ты меня понимаешь? Ты: You understand me? You understand me, right?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Как же круто! Что дал: How cool! What's next! Where is your home? What do you do?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Вы спите в разных кро:
Do you sleep in different beds? Do you have a lot of 
adventures?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Что нужно делать? Что: What do we do? What do you usually do after transformation?
dialogs_swamp_camp_С кем ты тут говоришь: Who are you talking to in here?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Сон приснился? Ты гов: Were you having a dream? Do you talk in your sleep?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ну, ладно. Просто ты: Okay then. You just woke me up.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ну вот, мне опять сня: Dang it, I'm having furry dreams again!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Чушь какая! Надо собр:
Nonsense! I need to get it together and get back to work... 
*yawns* ...tomorrow.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Кажется, проход к пещ:
Looks like a passage to the caves... And what should I do 
there?
Looks like a passage to the caves...
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ох, нет... Чувствую с:
Oh no... I feel terrible due to the poison. I'd better take a nap 
before wandering around.
dialogs_swamp_camp_И что мне там делать?: And what should I do there?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Я знаю, кто отравил ч: I know who poisoned the cup...
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ты уверен, Эйрик? Мы:
Are you sure, Eirik? We can't just take our guess! We only 
have one chance to accuse the poisoner.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Да, это Вождь Крэйг: Yes, it was Craig the Leader
dialogs_swamp_camp_Да, это знахарь Фагоп: Yes, it was Fagop the healer
dialogs_swamp_camp_Да, это воин Кроук: Yes, it was Croak the warrior
dialogs_swamp_camp_Нет, мне нужно кое-чт: No, I need to double check
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ты сможешь рассказать: Can you tell the whole story? Why and how did they do it?
Okay, you're right. What if I'm just pointing my finger at the sky?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Вы уверены, что хотит:
Are you sure you want to go to bed? If you do this, you will no 
longer be able to solve this case on your own.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Я знаю, кто отравил ч: I know who poisoned the cup.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Правда? Мы не можем п: Do you? We can't just take our guess, Eirik.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Не все сразу! Я хочу: Not like that! I want to enjoy the moment.
dialogs_swamp_camp_А я и не играю. Нужно: And I'm not playing. We need to gather everyone in the square.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ну же, доверься мне!:
Come on, trust me! I've always trusted you, shouldn't it work
both ways?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ладно, если ты абсолю:
Okay, if you're absolutely sure, I... Okay.
I'll go talk to Leader Craig.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ты хотел, чтобы мы вс: You wanted us all to come, Eirik. We are here.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Человек теперь собира:
A human is now gathering the tribe. I thought it couldn't
get any worse than that.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Да я собрал здесь вас:
Yes, I gathered you here for a reason. There's a murderer 
among us.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Да-да, я перехожу к с: Yes, yes, I'm getting to the point.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Кто-то из вас может д:
Some of you may think that yesterday you saw the wrath of the
Sacred Tree. That all's due to the traditions' violation.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Черт подери, в каком: Damn it, in some sense this is all true!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Вы достаете пустой фл: You take out an empty poison bottle and show it to the crowd.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Это крысинный яд. Его:
It's rat poison. It was stolen from Fagop's stash, carried to the 
rite,  and then thrown into the trash in hopes to get rid of 
evidence.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Никакой магии! Один и:
No magic! One of the people in the circle poured cliché rat 
poison into the ceremonial cup. That's traditions' violation for 
sure!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Значит, тебя пытались: So they've tried to poison you.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Меня? Нет. То, что я:
Me? No. The fact that I drank from the cup first is simply a
confusing detail. Nobody knew I'd be invited into the circle.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Никто! Это был день Т:
Nobody! It was Tina's day, the poisoner thought they'd get rid 
of her alone. But who had the grudge against this sweet girl?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ну, мало ли! Тот же Г:
You never know! Take Gubble, he hates all humans as much
as he hates her.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ну конечно! Грязная о:
Well, of course! The dirty monkey is going to make me a traitor
and a bad sheep!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Нет. То есть да, ты м:
No. I mean, yes, you're nasty, but you were in the square when 
I came to senses. And I know the poisoner fled from the square 
earlier.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Это был не ты. Это бы:
It wasn't you. It was the one who stole the poison from Fagop.
The one who snuck into his house while he was away.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Тем вечером Фагоп раз: That evening Fagop was giving away the cure to the children.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Тем вечером мой свиде:
That evening my witness saw a dark silhouette near the 
Fagop's shack. Someone in women's clothing quickly slipped 
inside.
dialogs_swamp_camp_И вот у нас остался т: And now we only have one suspect left.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Отравитель стоял в це: The poisoner stood in the ceremonial circle. One of the six.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Он ушел раньше. Его у: They left early. They were no longer there when I came round.
dialogs_swamp_camp_И это женщина, котора:
And it was a woman who could quickly slip into the Fagop’s 
shack.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Вряд ли это тетушка К:
It couldn't be Auntie Hylidae because she was sitting with the 
kids all evening.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Остается только один: There is only one option left.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Клэр?.. Нет! Зачем ей: Claire?.. No! Why would she do this!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Полагаю, ревность. Он:
Jealousy, I guess. She attempted to kill her stepsister because 
she could not share her boyfriend with her.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Нет-нет-нет! Не правд: No no no! That's not true!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Она не моя сестра! Он:
She's not my sister! She can't be part of the tribe at all!
This is all wrong!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Почему с ней все так: Why is all the fuss about her?! She's our enemy, she's a human!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Отец, почему?! Я всег:
Father, why?! I always put up with her, I thought you kept her 
here out of pity! And now she's a part of the tribe?!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Вы все помешались на:
You're all obsessed with her! Trill writes her damn serenades!
Do you think this is normal? How am I worse than her, Trill?
How can you fall for this freak?!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Нет, это вы! Вы все п: No, it's all on you! You all betrayed me, our traditions, you...
dialogs_swamp_camp_Нет! Это они должны у: No! They are the ones to go! I am not leaving!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ты знаешь, что случит: You know what will happen if you don't leave.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Дочь я... Зачем же ты: My daughter... Why did you do this?..
dialogs_swamp_camp_Мы не даем время прощ:
We don't give time to say goodbye to the exile, GET OUT 
NOW!!!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Вы вывели отравителя:
You brought the poisoner to an answer! New unique item 
received: Deerstalker hat!
dialogs_swamp_camp_От него нужно избавит: We need to get rid of him, he knows everything!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Я хотела сказать... о: I meant... he's going to accuse me tomorrow!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Да ничего подобного!: Nothing! I don’t understand a damn thing she says!
dialogs_swamp_camp_..? Да?! Но ты подслу: ..? Oh?! But you overheard me talking, and I thought!..
dialogs_swamp_camp_Пап, прогони ее! Прог: Send her away, dad! Away, away!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Она пыталась зарезать: She tried to stab you in your sleep. I stepped in.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Святые корни! Идем со: Holy roots! Come with me, Claire.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Да, рана правда вроде: That wound doesn't seem too deep, it's just... Oh, Roxy!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ладно, я сейчас верну:
Okay, I'll be right back. Everything will be okay. Lie down for 
now.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Дело не в нем! Я вооб:
It's not about him! I didn’t even know the Leader would call him 
over and let him drink from the cup!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Так ты хотела... отра: So you wanted to... poison Tina?!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Да, просто... Здесь с:
Yes, it’s just... People are fussing around her all the time,
everyone's obsessed with her!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ты знал, что Трилл по:
Did you know Trill was singing some damn serenades to her?!
Tell me, what did he see in this freak?!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Парнишка Трилл? Вы шу: That guy Trill? Are you joking? You fought over a boy?!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Я всегда терпела ее,:
I always put up with her, I thought you kept her out of pity!
And now she's a part of the tribe?! To play her tricks here?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Святые корни, я даже: Holy roots, I didn't even think about this Trill guy!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ты пыталась отравить: You tried to poison your sister because of this?!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Нет! Нет-нет, она мне:
No! No-no, she’s not my sister, she’s just a freak that you 
sheltered! This joke of a frog has ruined my whole life!
dialogs_swamp_camp_...я иду говорить с в: ...I'm going to talk to the Leader...
dialogs_swamp_camp_Пап, ты шутишь? Ты ве: Dad, are you kidding? You're kidding, right?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Во-первых я подслушал:
First, I overheard Gubble's conversation. The theory that he set 
it all up doesn’t sound so plausible anymore.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Во-вторых, я знаю, чт:
Secondly, I know that the one who added poison had left the 
square early to get rid of evidence.
dialogs_swamp_camp_В-третьих, и самое гл:
Thirdly, and most importantly, I have the bottle on me!
It proves that it was poison!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Это крысиный яд из ко:
This is rat poison from Fagop's collection. I should have a talk
with him. And with Mary, too.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ты что-то нашел в пещ: Did you find something in the cave?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Мистер Фагоп, вы узна: Mr. Fagop, do you recognize this bottle?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Да. Я храню в таких я: Yes. I keep rat poison in these... Wait, where did you get it?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Я нашел его в мусоре!: I found it in the trash!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Да нет же, я не выбра:
Not possible, I don’t just throw them in the trash, that would be
such a waste! I wash them to reuse.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ну как-то же он оказа: Well, somehow it ended up in the trash pit!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Не знаю... Ты же не х: I'm not sure... You don’t want to say that I?...
dialogs_swamp_camp_Я не выбрасывал флако: I didn't throw the bottle away!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Да, я знаю! Вы не дал:
Yes, I know! You didn't let me finish. I have a witness who saw
it being thrown away.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Это не могли быть вы: It couldn't be you, you were in the square at that moment.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Но отравитель должен:
But the poisoner must have taken it from you. You didn't
happen to lend a flask of poison to anyone?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Нет, конечно. Хотя по:
Of course not. But wait! Come to think of it, I missed one
of the bottles about a week ago.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Я подумал, я просчита:
I thought I miscalculated! Maybe I'd find it later under the bed 
or... I don't know, I didn't think much of it!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Выходит, кто-то украл: Turns out someone stole it from you to bring it to the ceremony.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Когда это произошло?: When did it happen? When did it disappear?
dialogs_swamp_camp_У меня было куча дел:
I had a lot on my plate back then. The whole tribe was sick,
you just sent me the cure. I had no time for rat poison!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Я думаю, это произошл:
I think it happened that evening when I was walking around
the settlement to give the children their cure. Yes.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Время сходится. Это н:
The timing's right. It couldn't have happened earlier: I checked 
all the supplies the day before. I needed a spare, so I looked 
everywhere.
dialogs_swamp_camp_А когда закончил обхо:
And when I finished my rounds, I had to clean it up. Then it
seemed to me that one bottle was missing.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Вечер, когда вы разно:
The evening when you were giving away the cure. The 
poisoner snuck into your house and stole one flask of poison 
that evening.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Кто-то мог видеть, кт: Could anyone see someone breaking in on you that day?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Все больше переживали:
Everyone was worried about their children, I think. And no one
usually comes to my side of the swamps.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Если бы у нас был сви: If we had a witness, it would make things a lot easier.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Да! Но кто бы это мог: Right! But who could it be?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ладно. В любом случае:
Alright. In any case, the riddle is solved, step by step.
We know that someone poisoned the cup, we know how and 
when.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Но этого все еще мало: But it's still not enough to accuse anyone!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Да. Но скоро я во все: Yes. But soon I'll figure it all out.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Хорошо. Когда закончи:
Fine. When you're done, come to me. I'll ask the Leader to
gather the tribe, and we will bring the poisoner to an answer.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Вы можете раскрыть эт:
You can solve this case!
You can approach Merigold any time and accuse one of
suspects. You should know that:

You only have one chance!
If you accuse someone without sufficient grounds, 
they won't believe you! Even if your guess is correct, 
you will lose the opportunity to get to the bottom on your own
in case you don't gather enough information to charge.

If you go to bed, the opportunity will be missed!
During this evening you must collect the missing pieces
of the puzzle, determine the suspect and his motive.
Make sure you have all the information and call out the poisoner.

Good luck, Sherlock!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Этот человек ходит ту:
This human walks around here as if ut's his home!
Eavesdropping, snooping, trying to find something...
dialogs_swamp_camp_И ты туда же!? Никто:
And you too?! Nobody poisoned him! The Sacred Source 
rejected him, he's a human! I knew this would happen!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Да-да, конечно... И к: Yeah right... And who does he suspect?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Какая разница, если э:
Who cares if it's all nonsense! The trouble is that the Leader 
allows him this! He was spying after Gubble, can you imagine?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Человек, который ходи:
A human who walks around the settlement and tries to find 
something out is a spy! Since when do we let spies in?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Кхм... Думаешь избави: Hmm... Thinking of getting rid of him?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Просто... Почему? Тин:
Just... Why? Tina was always an embarrassment in my life!
All my life I've been forced to be a stepsister to a human!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ее все ненавидели! Де:
Everyone hated her! The children laughed at her, the adults
stared at her, and I had to stand aside and tolerate it!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Терпеть, что эта урод: To tolerate that this ugly thing is my relative!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Да, тяжело тебе пришл: Yes, wasn't it hard for you!
I wish it all just... ended!
dialogs_swamp_camp_ТЫ! Ты... что тут дел: YOU! What were you... doing here?!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Нет! Ты подслушивал!:
No! You were eavesdropping! What did you want to know, 
hmm?!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Думаешь ты самый умны: You think you're the smartest, don'tcha?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Вали отсюда, урод!: Get out of here, you freak!
dialogs_swamp_camp_А та милая мышь, кото: And that cute mouse that was with you?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ох, ну... ее со мной: Oh, well... she's not with me. You don't mind, do you?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Против? Нет, конечно,: No, of course no, come in!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ты вроде как часто хо: You seem to walk around Tina's house a lot?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Что? Тебе это Клэр ск: What? Did Claire tell you this?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ну... Ты вроде как тв:
Well... You're kind of an artsy person, right? Exotics 
connoisseur. There is nothing wrong with being interested in 
a human girl.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Понятно. Ее сестра оп:
I get it. Her sister was complaining again. Do you want the 
truth?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Клэр ревнует меня! Он:
Claire is jealous of me! She's making a drama out of it 
because she's crazy about me!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ого, с ума по тебе сх: Wow, crazy about you, huh! So you are our heartthrob!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ничего смешного! Клэр: It's not funny! Claire is mad that I like her sister.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Хочешь сказать, что с: Are you saying that your sisters fought because of you?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Если бы это было так,:
If this was the case, it would be quite intriguing for sure!
But no, not really.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Во-первых, да, Клэр н:
First of all, yes, Claire has a crush on me, but Tina won't
notice me at all.
dialogs_swamp_camp_А во-вторых, Клэр и т:
And secondly, Claire has already disliked her sister her whole 
life. I'm partly just an excuse. Last straw.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Она не показывает это:
She doesn't show it at home in front of her father, but damn!
Claire hates Tina!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Она у нее и сестра не:
She is both a fake sister and a frog... I remember she told me
casually that I shouldn’t be looking at Tina.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Дескать, племя ее все:
As if they say that the tribe still will not recognize her as my 
bride, because she is not one of us.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Вот именно! Кто говор:
I know, right! Who spoke about marriage? There are many
exciting things that Tina and I could do on our way around
this boring ritual!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Так или иначе, я пред:
Anyway, I can imagine how angry Claire was when the Leader
insisted that Tina undergoes the rite of passage.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Думаю, мысль о том, ч:
I think the idea that Tina won't be officially accepted into the 
tribe... I don’t know... calmed her down?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Значит, Клэр недолюбл:
So Claire didn't like Tina, she was jealous of you, and...
probably got angry when they decided to accept Tina into 
the tribe?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ну, об этом мы и гово: Well, that's what we're talking about, yeah.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Я тебе не дружок!: I am not a buddy to you!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Скажи, ты тут часто б: Tell me, do you come here often?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ну да! Это мое место,: Well, yes! This is my place, no one else comes here!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Когда Фагоп лечил дет:
When Fagop was treating the children, were you here too?
You didn't seem to be sick, did you?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Че, тупой?! Говорю же:
Are you stupid?! I’m telling you, that's my place, I’m always 
here!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Не видел случайно зде: Did you happen to see anyone here that evening?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Видел. Баба какая-то:
I did. Some woman ran by, got throw the window, rummaged
around there, and then ran back.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Не знаю. Темно было,: Don't know. It was dark, I could hardly see anything.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Почему же ты уверен,: Why are you sure it was a woman then?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Значит, кто-то влез в:
This means someone climbed through the window... Fagop
didn't mention this. Turns out it was a thief. The poisoner. 
Or rather miss poisoner...
dialogs_swamp_camp_Чего?! Ты это мне?: What?! Are you talking to me?
dialogs_swamp_camp_С собой разговариваеш: Talking to yourself? Are you mad?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Мы можем вернуться к: We can return to the rite when you are ready.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ох, нет, Вождь. Боюсь: Oh no, Leader. I'm afraid this is too much.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Так ты все же отказыв: So you refuse to be accepted into the tribe after all?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Не то, чтобы я этого: It's not that I don't want it, it's just...
dialogs_swamp_camp_Тина ждала этого так:
Tina had been waiting for this for so long, and I was kind of
just passing by... I think you have to earn it, you know?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Что ж, хорошо. Но ты:
Well, good. But you should know that you will always be
welcome here.
dialogs_swamp_camp_И не только здесь. Я: And not only here. I let the other leaders know.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Да. Отныне тебя приму:
Yes. From now on you will be welcomed in all parts
on this side of the river.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Хотите сказать, что я:
Are you saying that I can now walk through, say, the
Wolf Clan territory?
dialogs_swamp_camp_То есть все дозорные:
That is, all the sentinels of all clans received
special orders on me?!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Грядут большие переме:
Changes are coming, Eirik. The fog is weakening. Soon people
over the river will rise.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Мысль, что в обозримо:
The thought that in the foreseeable future they may receive
reinforcements from overseas will make them bolder.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Не знаю, кому суждено:
I don’t know who is destined to win the war to come, but
in times like these you can never have too many friends, right?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ну... кхм. Может войн: Well... ahem. Maybe war can be avoided?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Может быть. Я хотел б: It may be so. I would like that. Maybe it is possible. Who knows.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ну вот. Надеюсь шрама: Here you go. I hope it won't leave a scar.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Это ничего. Спасибо,: It's nothing. Thank you, you are very, very cute!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Не за что, сладкая. П: You're welcome, sweetie. Just be more careful next time.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Я обычно очень осторо:
I'm usually \fivery\fr careful. I was hiding as usual, but then she
sneaked in holding a knife, and I just...
She wanted to kill him. I thought I should step up.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Да, у этого парня ест:
Yes, this guy has it to push very intelligent
and cautious mice into doing crazy things.
dialogs_swamp_camp_О, вы уже подружились: Oh, you're buddies already! That was quick!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Это ты быстро. Знаком:
You're the quick one. Known the girl for a day and almost killed 
her!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Эй, я то тут при чем!: Hey, what do I have to do with it!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Если бы ты раньше дог:
If you'd guessed who poisoned the cup sooner, this wouldn't've
happened.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ты вообще всю дорогу: You suspected the wrong one all along!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ха! Ладно тебе, я про: Ha! Come on, I'm just teasing you!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Выдвигаемся? Идем к т: Shall we? Shall we go to your house? Well... Our house.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Спасибо, что вы были:
Thank you for joining us in this little detective adventure!
We hope you enjoyed it as much as we did!
Save your progress and stay tuned.
                                With love, FoxTailTale!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Поверить не могу, что: I can't believe you were right!
dialogs_swamp_camp_С другой стороны, у в: On the other hand, everyone has good days!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Наверное. А ты, выход: Maybe. And it turns out you were wrong! Poor Mary...
dialogs_swamp_camp_Завязывай язвить! Все: Stop being sarcastic! Everything seemed so obvious!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Только не мне, моя ми: Not for me, my dear Merigold!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ладно-ладно, отдаю те:
Okay, okay, I give you the credit! You did well.
Or rather, you and your new friend!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Да! Мэригольд сказала:
Yes! Merigold said that I was a good girl, and that
without me you wouldn't make it!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ха! Вижу вы уже сдруж: Ha! I see you're buddies already!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Да, Мэригольд очень м:
Yes, Merigold is very cute! She invited you and me to dinner,
by the way.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ох, древнелисья кухня: Oh, ancient fox cuisine... Definitely someday! Maybe in a week...
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ты не против немного: Would you mind taking a little walk around before bed?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Мне нужно развести со: I need to get the neighbor's kids home. Shall we go?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Неправда! Солнце еще: Liar! The sun hasn't started to set yet!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ты так говоришь, пото:
You say that because you're small! I’m higher up and I can
definitely see that the sun has already touched the horizon.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ага, тебе деревья про: Yeah, the trees just block everything for you.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Пойдем, мы проводим т: Come on, let's take you home.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Так ты вроде как мест: So you're kind of like the local kindergartener?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Думаю, я просто помог:
I think I'm just helping Auntie Hylidae. She was the one who
always took care of the children. She was a teacher for the 
tribe.
dialogs_swamp_camp_В детстве я часто кру:
As a child, I often followed her and listened to our legends.
Now I’m retelling them to other children.
dialogs_swamp_camp_К тому же у меня полу: Besides, I get along with children and...
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ха, да, наверное, я ч: Ha, yeah, I guess I'm something of a local kindergartener!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Пойдем, нам нужно най: Let's go, we need to find all the children and take them home.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Пойдем, я отведу тебя: Come on, I'll take you to your mom.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Это ведь один из тех:
Is this one of those little frogs who asked you not to drink
from the cup?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Да. Не знаю, что ему:
Yes. I don’t know what to answer him. I understand what he's
going through but I was so looking forward to the rite!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Без этого ритуала то:
Without this ritual, the place where I grew up all my life
feels like it’s not mine.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Как думаешь, в поселе:
Do you think there's anyone in the settlement who's against
you being accepted into the tribe? Those who wish you harm?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Пытался ли кто-то мен: Was someone trying to poison me? I find this hard to believe.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Конечно, не всем нрав:
Of course, not everyone likes me here, but to arrange it 
on purpose? So cruel...
dialogs_swamp_camp_Потому и боюсь, что э:
That’s why I’m afraid that this was not poisoning, and it's even
worse than that, and the fact is...
dialogs_swamp_camp_Уже поздно, тебя ждет: It's getting late, your mother is waiting for you.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Значит, ты пересек Ве:
So you have crossed the Great Fog on your ship.
What was it like?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Да. В преданиях говор:
Yes. Legends say that the Fog is a labyrinth for souls.
That the Tree surrounded the island with the Fog to protect us 
from people.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Не знаю, но она так г:
I don't know, but that's what she says. Anyway, I just want to 
say that all this is very unusual.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Извини, что потащила: Sorry for dragging you along. I needed to do this before sunset.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Не думала, что ты люб: I didn't think you like taking care of children.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ну, может, дело прост: Well, maybe it's just good company?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Хм... Мы можем повтор:
Hmm... We can do this again tomorrow evening.
If you want to, of course.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Пошли, подготовлю теб: Let's go, I'll make your bed.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ты рассказывал про во:
You talked about the she-wolf. You said that she's not from the 
clan.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ох, я должен объяснит:
Oh, I have to explain! Merigold invented the potion that 
converts the dormant furries.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Да, вроде того! И не:
Yes, something like that! And not only her, there is also Hannah!
Now I kind of have a house, even a garden... 
Damn, a whole farm! That's not what I'd expect from myself!
dialogs_swamp_camp_И ты можешь обращать:
So you convert dormant furries? With the help of Merigold's 
potion?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ладно. Не буду тебе м: Okay. I will not bother you anymore. Good night, Eirik!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Вы сможете еще раз пр: You can take a walk with Tina again tomorrow \fbevening.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ну что? Прогуляемся е: Well? Shall we go for another walk today?
dialogs_swamp_camp_О! Да, я как раз соби: Oh! Yes, I was just about to go out!
You look puzzled. Is there something you want to ask?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ну... Ночью, после то:
Well... At night, after our walk, I thought I heard a voice from 
your room.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Сначала я подумала, м:
At first I thought maybe you talk in your sleep, but I'm almost
sure that it was a girl's voice.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Извини, если лезу не: Sorry if I'm sticking my nose into something.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ничего! Я и сам подум:
It's okay! I thought I was dreaming, too! But it turned out
that it was an uninvited guest.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Наш разговор подслуша:
One of the dormant furries overheard our conversation and
took my bag to drink the potion!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Дремлющая полезла за: Did the dormant one reach for your potion?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Зачем ей делать это?:
Why would she do this? I was taught that dormant furries
choose such a life for themselves.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Считается, что решени:
For furries, the decision to go into the woods and abandon 
civilization is considered their personal choice!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Может их родители что:
Maybe their parents made some decisions. But the ones I 
know, they were just born animals and didn’t know what to do 
with it.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Скорее как проклятье,: More like a curse, you know?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Все думаю, насчет тех: I keep thinking about those girls. The furries you converted.
I think I understand them. It must be terrible to be out of place.
Although...
dialogs_swamp_camp_Ох.. А что бы сказала: Oh.. And what would you say?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Мы не останавливаем т:
We do not stop those who want to give up the language
and live a wild life. Why should we stop those who want 
to return?
dialogs_swamp_camp_Думаю, тетушка Квакша:
I think Auntie Hylidae would say that you need to look at the 
roots, not at the crowns.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Скажи, а с теми девуш: Tell me, are you a thing with those girls? Sexually.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Нет. Ну может... В це: No. Well, maybe... In general, nothing serious.
dialogs_swamp_camp_\"Ничего серьёзного\": "Nothing serious"?! That's how it is with you!
dialogs_swamp_camp_Легко относишься к та:
You take such matters lightly. If anything, I don't blame you.
This is fine.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Все интересуются таки:
Everyone is into such things, aren't they?
Though, I have little experience in this.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Почему так? Ты не каж: Why is that? You don't seem too shy.
dialogs_swamp_camp_Я и не сказала, что я: I didn't say I was shy, I just...
dialogs_swamp_camp_Я провела всю юность:
I spent my entire youth here, and maybe I just didn’t find 
anyone who'd really attract me.
dialogs_swamp_camp_(Она так смотрит на м:
(She looks at me as if she wants to know something.
Should I push her?)

Fish far away from spices so they won't stink, water far from

trial_финальное_сообщение_28_06_2024:
The public version of the game ends here, but that's not all!
Work on the game continues thanks to our patrons!
You can also support us. Our sponsors get early access to new content: 
the patreon version is usually a few months ahead of the public version. 
Or you can just keep an eye out for public updates, and leave your 
comments and ratings!
Thanks for playing!
With Love, FoxTailTale!

Pretty, but useless relic. Better find something newer. Like...
literally anything.

Stabbing weapon of terrible quality, marked as defective.

Club with nails sticking out.

Тяжёлая дубина с шипастой железной обивк: Heavy club with spiked iron cover. Crushes bones with ease.
Древнее оружие ульфхеднаров. Тот, кто ви:
Ancient weapon of the ulfhednar. Those who saw it in action

Легкий меч, идеальный для быстрых колющи:
Light sword, ideal for fast thrusts. Simple weapon used by soldiers

Handy battle axe with narrow blade. Simple weapon used by

Mace with heavy head, made to smash shields and armor.
Simple weapon used by soldiers on both sides of the river.

Shield made of nailed planks. Though heavy and limiting, it

Примитивное, но опасное огнестрельное ор:
Primitive but deadly firearm. Slow to load, painful shot.

Хорошо сделанный щит из композитных мате:
Well-made composite shield. Protects as well as wood, but is

Склянки, важные записи, инструменты — вс:
Vials, notes, tools, and all the little things that can be of use.
Grants +3 TP growth each turn.
Укрепленным наручем можно прикрыться от:
Reinforced bracer blocks attacks; also unlocks a wide set of melee

Простой скрипучий арбалет. Долго заряжае:
Simple creaky crossbow. Slow to load, painful shot.
Grants ‘Crossbow Shot’ skill.

Шляпа, в которой Эйрика выбросило на бер: Cap Eirik was washed ashore in.
Удивительно, насколько хорошо справилась:
Surprisingly well-made, considering Ulfa made it in one night,

Perfect if you don’t want the dean to spot you.

Накидка из очень плотной кожи, защищающа: Very thick leather cloak protecting the body.
Темный капюшон, не столько защищающий, с:
Dark hood, better suited for hiding the face rather than for

Special jacket with high collar. Protects the body.

Cloth armor with steel inserts. Protects the body decently.
Закрывающий всё, кроме лица, шлем. Непло: Helmet covering all but the face. Protects the head decently.
Доспех из дубленой кожи. Неплохо защищае: Tanned leather armor. Protects the body decently.

Old enchanted ring. Might serve you better than it did to
its last owner.
Небольшой зачарованный брелок. Увеличива: Small enchanted charm. Raises max HP by 50.

Enchanted ring that is sure to help you in battle.
Зачарованный брелок. Увеличивает максима: Enchanted charm. Raises max HP by 75.
Весело блестит и приносит удачу. Дает +7: Shiny and lucky. Grants +7% crit chance, +15 Luck.
Зачарованное кольцо. Носишь его, и будто: Enchanted ring. Wearing it feels like you think faster.
Восстановливает здорвье каждому члену па: Restores full health to every party member. Removes all negative statuses.

web_build_message:
This is the end of the web version of our game, but your can 
export your saves to continue playing the full version on your 
device from where you left off! 
To do this:
1. Click \fbSave Export\fr and your browser will download save file
2. Download the latest version of the game from itch.io and launch it
3. Select the \fbSave Import\fr option from the main menu of the downloaded game
4. Select the downloaded file and restart the game
web_build_message_mobile:
This is the end of the web version of our game, but your can 
export your saves to continue playing the full version on your 
device from where you left off! 
To do this:
1. Click \fbSave Export\fr and your browser will download save file.
Important! The file must be saved to the default folder on android ("Download")
2. Download the latest version of the game from itch.io and launch it
3. Select the \fbSave Import\fr option from the main menu of the downloaded game
4. Restart the game
Эйрик(норма)_Ханна нашла кое-что полезно:
Hannah found something useful while cleaning up! It’s bog iron. I can
forge, say, nails out of it.
Эйрик (обычное лицо)_Зачем ты притворяеш: Why are you pretending? I heard you talking!
Ханна (гнев)_Откуда ты вообще знаешь, ка: How do you even know my name?!
СИСТЕМНОЕ_Спохватившись, Ханна прикрыла: Startled, Hannah covered her mouth with her hand.
Ханна (растерянность)_Я не должна говори: I’m not supposed to talk, I’ve never been able to talk!..
Эйрик (норма)_Если я правильно понял, Мэ:
If I got it right, Merigold, you’ve always been like this. It was
just hidden.
Эйрик (задумчивость)_Ты ведь не сегодня:
You didn’t ‘learn to talk’ today, did you? I think you’ve always
understood human speech.
Эйрик (обычное лицо)_Ну вот! А теперь ты: There you go! And now you can answer. Is that so bad?
Эйрик (обычное лицо)_Я понимаю, что ты р: I understand you’re confused, but try to calm down, okay?
Эйрик (обычное лицо)_Вообще-то, фурри ум: Actually, furries can turn into animals whenever they want!
Эйрик (обычное лицо)_Да. Тебе просто нуж:
Yes. You just need time to learn how to control your new body. Then
you’ll be able to choose yourself!
Try, I don’t know... Walking back and forth.
Системное_Ханна зажмурилась и сильно сжа: Hannah squeezed her eyes shut and clenched her fists tightly.
Эйрик (обычное лицо)_Ты пытаешь преврати: Are you trying to turn back into a sheep?
Эйрик (норма)_(Ого! Она что, прибралась: (Wow! Did she clean up in here?)
Эйрик (норма)_Ничего себе! Ты тут всё ра: No way! You cleared everything up here!
Ханна (расстерянность)_Ну, я не люблю, к:
Well, I don’t like it when the barn's dirty... I thought, since I
have hands now, I can fix it.
Эйрик (норма)_Отлично! Видишь, не так уж: Excellent! See, your new body isn’t so bad, is it?
Эйрик (норма)_А что? Разве плохо, что ты: What? Isn’t it good that you can do different things now?
Ханна (осматривает себя)_Да, но что мне: Yes, but what am I supposed to do with this!!!
Ханна (осматривает себя)_Я всегда была т: I used to be such a cute little sheep, and now...
Ханна (гнев)_У меня задние лапы в два ра:
My hind legs are twice as long as my front ones! And look how tall I
am now!
Эйрик_(Да уж, пока она была напуганной н:
(Yeah... When she was a scared mute sheep, it was easier not to
notice her nudity...)
Эйрик_Это считается, типа, аппетитными ф: Those are what you’d call appetizing curves!
Ханна_Аппетитными? Вот именно! Будто я в: Appetizing? Exactly! As if all I’ve done my whole life is eat!
Ханна (осматривает себя)_Раньше я была т: I used to be so slim, and now!..
Эйрик_Да нормальные они! Очень даже мила: They’re fine! A very cute pair of... boobs...
Эйрик_(Так, Эйрик, прекращай пялиться, е: (Alright, Eirik, stop staring, she doesn’t need that right now!)
Эйрик (норма)_Ханна, поверь мне, ты зря: Hannah, trust me, you’re worrying for nothing!
Эйрик (норма)_По человеческим меркам ты: By human standards, you’re still slim!
Ханна (растерянность)_Как я теперь верну: How am I supposed to go back to Simen now?..
Ханна (растерянность)_Сколько бы я ни пы: No matter how much I try to turn back, it doesn’t work...
Эйрик (норма)_А вы с Сименом хорошо лади: You and Simen got along well, right?
Ханна (радость)_Я его всегда выручаю. И:
I always help him. I sing him songs, and dance with him when he comes
out to the meadow with me...
Ханна (растерянность)_Как он теперь без: How will he manage without me? He won’t be able to!
Ханна (растерянность)_Если не стоять на: If you don’t stand on your hind legs, it’s kind of fine, right?..
Ханна_Смотри, что если так?_new_hannah: Look, what if I do this?
Ханна_Я похожа на нормальную овечку?_new: Do I look like a normal sheep?
Эйрик_Тебе абсолютно точно не стоит так: You absolutely should not do that around Simen!
Эйрик(норма)_Я вообще не думаю, что тебе:
I don’t think you should pretend at all. You’re... not just a sheep,
Hannah.
Ханна (растерянность)_Но что мне теперь: But what am I supposed to do now?..
Эйрик(норма)_Возможно, тебе лучше пока н: Maybe you shouldn’t rush? Get used to it? Learn to be yourself?
Эйрик(норма)_Если подумать, то так ты см:
If you think about it, this way you’ll be able to take care of Simen
much better. You just need time.
Эйрик(норма)_Ты можешь пожить здесь, пок: You can stay here until you decide what to do next.
Эйрик(норма)_И, кстати, спасибо за уборк: And by the way, thanks for cleaning. It’s much better now!
Ханна (обычное лицо)_Не знаю, до этого я: I don’t know, I’ve only ever danced with Simen before.
Ханна (обычное лицо)_Он обычно пел свою:
He usually sang his little song, and we danced. Do you know the song
about Lorei?
Эйрик (задумчивость)_Не-а. Может, ты нап: Nope. Maybe you could hum it?
Эйрик (обычное лицо)_Ой, да брось! Это л: Oh, come on! It’s easy, look!
Эйрик (без аватара)_Пятнадцать человек н: Fifteen men on the dead man’s chest!
СИСТЕМНОЕ:_Ты несколько раз легко ударил: You lightly tapped your heels against the ground a few times.
Эйрик (без аватара)_Йо-хо-хо, и бутылка: Yo-ho-ho, and a bottle of rum!
Эйрик (без аватара)_Пей, и дьявол тебя д: Drink, and the devil will take the rest.
Ханна (без аватара)_Смотри, я могу на од: Look, I can stand on one leg!
Ханна_Просто... Дурацкое тело! Я так зап: Just... This stupid body! I’m so out of breath!
Ханна_У людей всегда так колотится сердц: Do humans’ hearts always pound like this?
Ханна_(А почему оно начинает колотиться: (And why does it only start beating faster?..)
Системное_Она неуклюже отстраняется от т: She awkwardly steps away from you.
Эйрик (норма)_Так что там за песенка про: So what’s that song about Lorei?
Эйрик (норма)_Теперь твоя очередь петь!_: Now it’s your turn to sing!
Ханна (без автара)_У берега сидела краса: By the river sat fair Lorei, Watching white sails drifting by...
